narrative.travel_description: I travelled using Obs 1 probably on public transport, maybe an Uber. Hung out in the shadows around the area maybe an hour or two before start. There was the usual Ruse of a VVIP pickup with security detail, earpieces, the whole bit! I had some minor celebrities in evening gowns manipulated/encouraged to participate in the entourage. I entered the vehicle as it arrived at Court (obs2). Visibly walked from limo to doorway/elevator/bouncer. Limousine departs with celebs in tow for a night at the Star Casino once I am out.
narrative.game_recount:
- tried to meet all the new players (1st time) so really just engaged in character with all players that would have the chat in character. There was the odd notable blanking and rudeness (presumably IC for "lore reasons"). No powers or spending influence.

- Premier finally addressed Carthians after keeping us waiting and proceeded to: set rules; offer explanations as to why this experiment needed to be done in a particular way; copped the verbal bluster of various Carthians trying to state covenant parity; stated a plan to restrict Elders and Blood Potency city-wide because "YOUNG" and "EXPERIMENT". Yusuf offered support to Carthian principles. tsk.

- Met with the other Carthians who seemed more concerned with establishing the rules for the committee to police each others behaviour according to a new rubric. One carefully designed so that all roles - EXCEPT PREMIER FOR SOME REASON - are shared like a fucking conch shell, so that no one can claim Regency except as proxy for the Movement. lol

- Noticed duplicitous dealings involving Invictus but had the Premier rudely "send me away"

- Made a ploy for Regency of Harbour against Reed to test the level of support. I did not manage to get a meeting with the Premier in time, or they forgot, whatever. My name was likely not even on the ballot. Just as well - I never found the voting box to place my influence. haha. OOC n00b.
narrative.standout_rp: Ludika - young Invictus (mekhet I think, maybe Ventrue - OOC I could NOT read any tags or sheets in the game unfortunately vision impairment). We had a fascinating IC conversation. She had real questions... Conrad Sonderguard. His innocent probing and gentle banter. Get close to that guy. Sneakiest bastard in court I reckon. Great IC interactions.
narrative.ic_correspondence:
X
Have [RE]cent eve[N]ts hav[E] [ST]unne[D] me[?]
[CARTHIAN] work[S] ar[E] quite[T] [UP]lifting.
[NE]v[E]r woul[D you] [H]av[E] mo[RE] joy [AS AP]pealing as this new experiment.

Ý̵̧̭Ù̴͓̐́S̵̟͖̐̑Ù̴͑́͝F̴͌̾̄͠
narrative.most_trusted_pc: `Einar TechnoViking` - perhaps. He seems ready to stand up to the Premier when they cross the line and betray Carthian principles but a little slow to see that line has already been crossed.
narrative.actively_harming_pc: Rene StD (Invictus), the real seat of power and influence in Sydney. THe worm in the Premiers ear. I have a verbal truce to work with, rather than against, Reed Justice (Conan) and I am happy to be true to that arrangement. But....Rene..... He's Invictus "Team Captian", Primogen, Regent of Docks, presumably way up in his clan status too. this guy has peak influence, more city status than the Premier probably.... Why has no one noticed? Am I living in LALA land?
narrative.aspirations:
Yusuf feels isolated and unsupported. The Mammon Cult (MMN) is in formative stage, but I dont really have any surety to bother building it up just for someone else to take. At the same time I have not been subtle with its presence. The cult served its initial purpose - the contrivance to get me to Sydney. It stands out as a target. Perhaps I will set it up at this stage as a honey-pot to lure investigation and actions of other kindred. I see the cult as a presently useful expendable asset.

I am guest everywhere, marginalised even in the Covenant. Yusuf has a job here in Sydney - to protect Brandy. But he sees both her and Eve witless puppets on a string of more organised powers. A dangerous predicament. Yusuf must help himself first. Hence taking OBS5. And working on his lair. Mt plans are to get safe and embedded. This court seems like a dangerours and specially curated fishbowl designed to fail. I worry about the consequences for the Carthian Movement. I fear we have been trojan horsed by Eve with a plan to humiliate the movement on the global stage as the "Carthian Experiment" fails spectacularly.

It is unlikely building clan status within the Carthians will be viable. They are riven, misguided and working against their own interests. Eve has already cleverly seen to that. Handing out boons to those who are giddy with the proximity to praxis and ignoring those not actively bending knee. The younger Carthians in the movement seem enthusiastic to embrace a "lets see hoe THEY like it attitude, rather than a lets do this properly".

The City status game is meta-unstable and already stitched up. There are inner and outer cliques quickly forming and Yusuf sees no way into the inner cliques. So Yusuf must build.... 
with what he has left in the space left to him. THE SEWERS.

The sewers and catacombs in the territory no one bothered wanting... with his Clan - the Nosferatu. There are not many Nos, and they don't usually play well - not with others and not with themselves. I will make a place in the catacombs. I will open it to others of my kind. I will see who will come to the Necropolis once it is built. The first bricks are laid in this downtime.

SHORT: GET MYSELF SAFE
MEDIUM: BUILD THE NOS, PROTECT MMN
LONG: NECROPOLIS UNDER THEIR FEET

feeding.method:
Presence 4 + Empathy 3 + Spec: Motives 1 = 12
Type: HUMAN blood
Style: I like the homeless people. The cold, dark and rains drive them into the corners where this crawler creeps. Face-in-the-crowd Yusuf blends in. He likes the dirt and the smell. 
He likes the taste, a goon-bag of wine and a blanket are gifts enough. They sit and talk about their shit lives. Yusufs life was probably shitter, but at least they feel it, Yusuf thinks. And he tastes the goon-bag and hardship in them equally. He drinks at the end of the bin-fire in the hours just before dawn - never killing these.... no never killing. This is an act of sharing in my mind... lol

*Normally* he eats from his HERD of Bankers and the Elites from behind the Mammon throne. Expensive cologne, pressed shirts. They offer their necks up - ecstatic and trembling.

It is a bland feast and sometime you just need "home*less-cooking".

projects.description:
Project Name: A fear cleanse of the Burrows
Characters: Me 
Merits: Air of Menace
XP: None
Description: I am physically taking myself physically through whatever tunnels I can get access to. The deeper and weirder the better. Appearing as familiar maintenance crew using OBS or simply invisible - i root around down there spreading terror. Moving out the Cave Clan (Human sydney-based subterraneanist community irl) using dread presence and waking terror (nightmare 4). Making it very inhospitable. It will help motivate the "emergency works" needed to seal it off... cf Mystery Cult Acquisition action

projects.action_type_raw: Misc: For things that don't fit in other catagories 🤷‍♂️
projects.desired_outcome: Move Safe Place 1 into Under Harbour
projects.description:
NAME: A rotten Nest
CAST: Me
MERITS: Safe Place 1
XP: NONE
DESC: I am starting to setup my own personal space in the underHarbour as it opens. A large Siphon. The access to it is presently a little too open. Too many routes still in and out that are mortal traversible, but it will be a great space with work. Whilst waiting for the future construction mods and investment, I move my possessions, set up a small lair, and shed the vitae to hide it, twist it, and make it a suitable nightmare churn-funnel so that Yusuf feels confident he would hear distant screams and not the sounds of approach...

NAME: "MMN Sees"

DESC: This is the required DT action to keep the whole Mystery Cult apparatus going. Mainting networks, grooming new members, allocating resources, solving the odd mortal cult issue. I am supporting the Mammons cult activities in the SHORE

sphere_actions.action_type: Ambience Change (Increase): Make a Territory delicious 😄
sphere_actions.desired_outcome: Increase the SHORE ambience
sphere_actions.description: The Mammon cult may not be good for elite members, but on their climb up its ranks the entropy of their climb maketh the garden more verdant for all kindred...

sphere_actions.action_type: Ambience Change (Increase): Make a Territory delicious 😄
sphere_actions.desired_outcome: INCREASE the HARBOUR ambience
sphere_actions.description: The subtle pro-kindred enshittification of Sydney Harbour after dark. (For the Nos 3am vibe baby!!!)The territory will be both better (for all) and worse (for mortals) in a clever way. Events will simultaneously draw people into the Harbour district, but stupid track-works close down public transport just as events let out forcing walks home. Public works for safety that actually break existing lighting. Energy saving initatives means that there is dim-lights but far apart. cost savings. it is almost like the bad ideas are deliberate....

sphere_actions.action_type: Acquisition: Use your standing in Status/Mystery Cult to procure an item 💵
sphere_actions.desired_outcome: Reserve/Block access to chunks of sewer/rail networks
sphere_actions.description: The network of influence in Politics and Finance that is the MMN cult reaps its rewards in greased palms. The right bribe, the right contract, the right environmental report. Volia - whole chunks of subterranean tunnels sealed off with special works here - accidental concrete spill there, sealed off for the M11 tunnel. Tunnels, mostly bare, ugly, damp, infested. But directly underneath and nowhere all at once! It is a patchwork of forgotten RTA service tunnels, WW2 shuttered ammunition tunnels, redundant storm-water catchment sumps, etc... It is not ownership per se. It is sealing the entry points off little clusters and burying them administratively so they are nobody's business.

requests:
Contact Type: STREET
Supporting Info: rumours of a vigiliantee in the Harbour
Request: The word on the street is Ballsack is rolling in the lower tiers as a vigilantee. I want details. Is this some kind of Punisher style murderer using vigilantism as a justification to kill or is there a daredevil style hand targeting the previously untouchables? The street contacts may have anecdotes and better rumours. What is his caper? I am trying to find out the why more than the what.

Contact Type: LEGAL
Supporting Info: Previous DT searches in Finince Sphere
Request: Last months search indicated that there is another player with established Allies Finance in the game. A inquiry/ exposé on multi-nationals will be a good chance to look into new players in detail. (Avoid Reed Justice)

Contact Type: UNDERWORLD
Supporting Info: whos fucking with the Harbour
Request: Who is dedicating any efforts to systematically messing with Harbour infrastrucure

acquisitions.resource_acquisitions:
Character Resources Level: 3
Relevant Merit: Allies (Finance)
Res-Acq 1 Description: A continued investment in the maintenance of decoration of the MMN cult premises in the Shore. This is not security, the facility has no real security at this stage. I want it to LOOK like a VEILED THREAT, an obviously and SUSPICIOUSLY open target. It is what it is. "Like an obviously armed homeowner trying to trigger castle-doctrine". Any thinking kindred is being invited to look and think twice.
Res-Acq 1 Availability: 3
acquisitions.skill_acquisitions:
Character Skill Level: Intimidate 4 + Spec: Veiled Threats 1
Relevant Merit: Air of Menace +2, Contacts (Police)
Skill-Aqu # Description: Surveillance Thermal Cameras x3 with LoRaWanMesh Monitors x2 (Advanced - Encrypted Piezo-powered)
Skill-Aqu # Availability: 3 (+1 for the advanced I guess ST?) = 4

meta.st_notes:
yes.The surveillance cameras I am trying to procure are a gift for Conrad Sunderland. I will pass them on with the full chain-of-custody documentation that certifies they are not manipulated or modified in any way between the Israeli manufacturer and his secured delivery. It is up to his discretion whether to trust that - but I have not manipulated the cameras in any way. I make it very clear that these cameras are a gift, without strings or obligation attached and he is free to use them however he likes but he must note that there are 2 monitor portals for the cameras (there are 3 cams) and I have the second one. In the spirit of "a pleasure shared is a pleasure doubled". I will contact the player IC on Discord with my "attempt". I guess rolls will determine if it came off to secure them...

My nights are focused with either managing the cult of Mammons activities, which I see like a job taking several half nights every week. This occurs in the Shore. One of those, I will stop by the Crone Temple on night of service - explaining that the Mother offered invite that I have spontaneously accepted. (all true except the spontaneous part). This attendance is lip service to my Hostesses in the Shore. My initial actual curiosity in the sermon is minimal. But I have never actually witnessed any REAL CRUAC up close before and it might just be a surprise awakening. I should let Mother Crone Anichka roll against my Resolve+BP probably to see how compelling her sermon is. ;)

I like to inhabit the Harbour now. I like it neglected to be honest and I want to savour the shittyness before the kindred money moves in. I supplemnent herd feeding there. I lurk and menace. I want the sewers (only) to be a place of twisted vibes. particularly the near the manholes, drains and rail maintenance tunnels adjacent to my Safe Place. I want everything to avoid those corners except the cockies.

This serves the long-term goal to establish a SafePlace/Warren/Necropolis for the Nos.
[!!!] Im not going for any mechanical benefit from Nos rulebook. My XP is pre-spent in my head for the next 2 years... lol. At most I am trying to build up my own Clan status, by embodying peak-Nos'ness, supporting other clanspeeps, and reaching out along Nos lines so that the other Nos know the I/WE ARE here, lurking too. I'd be cool if we share SafePlace merits together, and my OBS5 Oubliette can make for a truly BIZONKERS commons. I reckon its narratively cool and want to try to get traction next game... I hope the STs agree?

projects.desired_outcome: Blush of Life for the night
projects.description:
Project Name: We Own the Night
Characters involved: Jack, Cyrus, Anichka, Keeper, Brandy, Alice, Charles, Ivana
Merits & Bonuses: Mantle of Amrous Fire + Viral Mythology + Cacophony Savvy
XP Spend: n/a

Project description:
Ritual Casting a variation of 'Mantle of the Predator Goddess'. 
As with Mantle of Amorous Fire, Acolytes dance themselves into a trance during the entire casting of this ritual and adopt the Blush of Life. They each must spend a point of Willpower to rise from the exhaustion. Once cast, the Acolytes flow with the grace of a perfect predator for the rest of the night. The Kine all but beg for their attention, stumbling into vulnerable positions with a subconscious prayer to prostrate themselves on her altar. The Acolytes are worshiped as Gods during the Rave. 
The vibe of this party permeates The Academy.

narrative.travel_description:
Same as last month, if anyone's gunna jump me then sucks to be me LOL

From last downtime-
She walks, generally, or uses Obs 1 to get a late bus if she gets the chance. I know walking to and from her territory may take multiple nights, but she travels close to waterways and other places with openings to seek shelter in.
narrative.game_recount:
- Sat in a corner a lot and did handicrafts. Now all the Crone present (and Charlie) have ribbons from the hunt. Alice helped, so she'll be in any resonance from them, too.
- Shook hands with a lot of people, especially some of the newcomers
- Met the Bishop, that was hilarious
- Met the Keeper's LS interest, Carver. He's interesting, and only here to learn about the past. A bit like me on that one. Mentioned the old Altar. May wanna touch base about that
- Talked to Tegan ha ha she was not happy I dreamed about her.
- Did what pushing I could for Alice to guard the North Shore while Charles wasn't here. I hope she gives him a run for his money on it, I think people like having someone 'innocent' in place there, we just need to make sure she gets good guidance if she stays
- Guided plotting for next game. Made sure Jack and Cyrus (and to a lesser extent Brandi) were on it. 
- Talked to Cyrus, gave my blessing to be involved in the Hunt memories. Really wish the Keeper had been a bit more chill, he really took Cyrus's absence personally.
narrative.standout_rp: Edna/Arlo, we got about two minutes of tense pleasantries in but I've been waiting for it. Peter/Yusuf, very strong character interactions and plotting. Good fun observing the new player in the bright orange-red suit get into character. Honourable mentions to Archer and Kurtis for solid characters that appealed to Anichka.
narrative.ic_correspondence:
To my Sire,

Oh, the coven near Lviv! A very good place to remember. Are they still there? I hope they are well. I hope Halyna is well.

Sydney is... a tribulation. It is raw, cutting grass. A portion of ground has been cut out, but as always, our kind are hungry, circling, wanting more from a city that does not welcome us. Not yet.

There is so much to do. We have claimed two of the primary territories for feeding. This means I must walk the spaces to help keep them safe. My Maiden, Alice, has been put in charge of one. If anyone takes advantage of her, I think our Circle will take action. Probably sudden and violent action.

I think there is something in the ocean, making people angry. I dreamed of an opening chest there, and our littlest says she has seen an angry lady there. We will investigate, of course, but I do not know if I should put up a wanted poster saying 'Have You Seen This Lady' or not. Time will tell.

I am starting my garden. I have learned about the plants here, cut my hands on them and scratched my feet. I will make them grow and they will fruit with blood. I have also dreamed of the old temple. We will search there and find answers. But not now. We must walk the borders and let the night know what belongs to us.

I wish you could see our work, but you must stay home. When I come back, Gods willing, I will show you through all I have learned.

I remain in service,
Anichka
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Charlie, Alice, Ivana, with a hat tip to Jack
narrative.actively_harming_pc: Nope!
narrative.aspirations:
Short term- Secure the Academy and the North Shore for the Crone, Host good party,make sure she doesn't get eaten by whoever owns the land where she lives.
Medium term- Continued stability for the Crone, exploration and potentail restoration of the Old Temple, good Mandragora garden.
Long term- Safety and Stability of self, family, Crone, and Praxis in that order (the middle two points are close)

feeding.method: I HEAR WE'RE HAVING A PARTY. Anichka is discerning with who she feeds from, looking for targets who haven't been drinking heavily or doing drugs (she'll branch out to 'not doing hard drugs' if finding someone with no drugs proves too hard). If it looks particularly sparse, she'll start using Auspex to try and find someone suitable, but not otherwise. Basically just trying to feed sensibly.

actions:
The family should continue living and establishing themselves, making themselves at home and part of the community, generally building their own safe space, with access to their culture for themselves and the children.

It is Orthodox Easter on the weekend of the 12th. Anichka urges her family to go if they're feeling it, especially if it will help create ties among the community and all that good shit.

She also asks them to get her a shovel, please, one for heavy duty use.

meta.st_notes:
- Anichka leaves herself open to the dreams this downtime. She is concerned about the lady who is angry that Ivana has told her about, and the blood in the water that Alice has warned her about, but does not want to force herself on the issue if The Gods do not think it is important. There might be nothing of worth this dowtime, she's chill about it. Just lights some incense sometimes, dances if she feels like it, gets a lot of good nights to sleep
- Anichka holds a little one night 'sermon' at the temple, and invites the Crone, as well as Yusuf and Charlie. My nominal concept is 'Names of the Gods;, and it's about why we do and don't need god-forces with names to worship. I'll hopefully get a wee writeup done but i'm sick as dog (as y'all know)
- After her Animal Murder feed, she does what she can to move the bodies to where she wants her Mandragora Garden to be. Burying them if she gets the chance, but just leaving them to moulder will still help.
- If she has the time, she will be participating in the ritual to get Cyrus back to his usual self, and shed the Crone's skin.
- 

- Didn't get the chance to do a Breaking Point check for the hunt last downtime
- In fact I'm not even sure she should be at Humanity 6, touchstone or nah.
- I have a massive pile of things that Anichka should have had at character creation. I'm going to be trying to buy those back as quickly as possible, but sometimes that's how the cookie crumbles. So far the list includes Crafts 2, Medicine 2, Science 1 or more (botany), Academics 1 (should probably have Subterfuge too >.>), A few dots of Primal Creation, and Shed the Virulent Bowel. Probably some merits that I can't think of right now, but here's a list of things that she should have, anyway.

I had more to say. I can't remember what it was. Maybe I'll open the form up again later tonight, but i'll submit this now in case I don't get that far.

narrative.travel_description: Brandy LaRoux used her resources and arrived at Court in a chauffeured black luxury car, taking indirect routes. Her before and afters are usually exclusive parties, events, or high end bars and gambling establishments. Usually with other kine but never directly linked to allies, herd or mystery cult.
narrative.game_recount:
- Collected Contacts of people in the Court (list of emails/numbers)
- Elevated the social status of 3 players
- Did a favour for Einar 
- Invited a select few members of the court to attend a dinner party to get to know the kindred better
narrative.standout_rp: - The Bishop (made an interesting frenemy)
narrative.ic_correspondence:
My dearest heart,

Sydney’s Court, sugar, is the dullest little parade I ever did see. All silk gloves and empty chatter, every last one of them smiling sweet while hidin’ knives right behind their teeth. Ain’t a soul here with the courage to say what they mean—just small minds playin’ big games, and none of it worth the trouble.

Truth be told, half of ’em smell like somethin’ crawled off to die, and the other half already did. Nosferatu, bless their unfortunate little hearts. And would you believe—one of those creatures had the audacity to pupate his boil on me. I kept my composure, of course… but Lord, it took near divine restraint not to make a scene they’d remember for a century.

Well, time to shake it like a Brandy Blood Martini sugar! I'm going to start up my usual monthly dinner parties. The whole works. I will find someone in this miserable gilded cage who can demonstrate some semblance of culture and enjoy themselves while doing it... can't be all pimples, politics, and pedestrian minds.

Miss you like the Moon misses the stars.

Yours always,
Brandy
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Alice (Forming a Coterie)
narrative.actively_harming_pc: The Invictis.
narrative.aspirations: Keep The Carthians in Power, so Invictis doesn't gain control.

Project description: Brandy hosts an exclusive weekend away—an indulgent, luxury retreat blending occult meditation, ritual practice, and refined self-care. Set in an opulent, secluded environment, the seminar weaves Crúac rites, guided introspection, and a curated “detox” of mind and spirit, balanced with spa treatments, stillness, and soft decadence. Through commanding presence and intimate teachings, she empowers the women of her cult to embrace their inner strength, sharpen their will, and return renewed—devoted, dangerous, and beautifully in control.

Project description: Brandy hosts an exclusive weekend away—an indulgent, luxury retreat blending occult meditation, ritual practice, and refined self-care. Set in an opulent, secluded environment, the seminar weaves Crúac rites, guided introspection, and a curated “detox” of mind and spirit, balanced with spa treatments, stillness, and soft decadence. Through commanding presence and intimate teachings, she empowers the women of her cult to embrace their inner strength, sharpen their will, and return renewed—devoted, dangerous, and beautifully in control.

responses.travel: Brandy LaRoux used her resources and arrived at Court in a chauffeured black luxury car, taking indirect routes. Her before and afters are usually exclusive parties, events, or high end bars and gambling establishments. Usually with other kine but never directly linked to allies, herd or mystery cult.
responses.game_recount:
- Collected Contacts of people in the Court (list of emails/numbers)
- Elevated the social status of 3 players
- Did a favour for Einar 
- Invited a select few members of the court to attend a dinner party to get to know the kindred better
responses.correspondence:
My dearest heart,

Sydney’s Court, sugar, is the dullest little parade I ever did see. All silk gloves and empty chatter, every last one of them smiling sweet while hidin’ knives right behind their teeth. Ain’t a soul here with the courage to say what they mean—just small minds playin’ big games, and none of it worth the trouble.

Truth be told, half of ’em smell like somethin’ crawled off to die, and the other half already did. Nosferatu, bless their unfortunate little hearts. And would you believe—one of those creatures had the audacity to pupate his boil on me. I kept my composure, of course… but Lord, it took near divine restraint not to make a scene they’d remember for a century.

Well, time to shake it like a Brandy Blood Martini sugar! I'm going to start up my usual monthly dinner parties. The whole works. I will find someone in this miserable gilded cage who can demonstrate some semblance of culture and enjoy themselves while doing it... can't be all pimples, politics, and pedestrian minds.

Miss you like the Moon misses the stars.

Yours always,
Brandy
responses.trust: Alice (Forming a Coterie)
responses.harm: The Invictis.
responses.aspirations: Keep The Carthians in Power, so Invictis doesn't gain control.
responses.rp_shoutout: ["- The Bishop (made an interesting frenemy)"]

responses.project_1_description: Brandy doesn’t skulk or hide in the shadows; she owns her territory openly. She patrols like a queen in her domain, using presence and intimidation to deter poachers with her power strut.

Project description: Brandy prepares for court and a bath of Bayoi mud; A Skip James record plays - Devil Got my Woman. Through controlled breathing, quiet reflection, and subtle Crúac rites, she works to steady the Beast and master the simmering anger beneath her polished exterior. The goal is not to silence the rage, but to own it—to leash it tight, so when it’s unleashed, it’s deliberate, precise, and devastating.

narrative.travel_description: Cazz walked, still not being used to Sydney streets - but took longer paths if needed.
narrative.game_recount:
- The movement met Yusef, who only just arrived. Had a chat later with Cazz and spoke about potentially working with each other.
- Found out a few other vampires felt the bad vibes felt mid last month. Eivar, in the Harbour. Cazz, Lucinda, in the Academy. Mac, in the Port. And Alice, but missed where she was. It was not just Cazz. Need to investigate more. Lucinda seems down for some investigating.
-There was an Invictus meeting where the door was magically locked. Found out later it Rene. He called it an 'old family thing'. A string to pull just for information's sake, later.
- Etsy got in trouble, missed out on seeing it, but heard about it. Doc had fun doing her job.
- Reed called a meeting of the Ventrue. Cazz doesn't like these kinds of social meetings, to put a vampire as the 'face' of the Ventrue.
narrative.standout_rp: Ryan (new player). How he played his very baby vampire was a delight to watch, and interact with. Hope to be able to have more scenes with him!
narrative.ic_correspondence:
Adeline
Writing when I can, as requested. Writing out things also helps one untangle things, like an annoying ball of wires and stray thoughts.
I've found at least one other who likes to look at things, research and such. Don't know the flavour of spice to her, yet. Dear Lucinda. She seems eagar, at least. Something was in the air, earlier. Something off. Can't tell what it is, yet. Others felt it too, so it's not our shared brand of maddening. So, she and her are going to see what we can find.
Still looking for someone especially interesting to tell you about. I have a lead on one in particular, once I have something more spicy for you, I will write again.
Hope your hotpot is still simmering nicely. Wouldn't want it to lose its tang
C
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Eivar. Cazz and him had a chat about some things this month (for real, this time!) and a secret was shared. Cazz will keep it with delight.
narrative.actively_harming_pc: No specific character, currently.
narrative.aspirations:
- Find out more general information / secrets to keep, and share, if needed. Brae is still feeling hesitant in the whole game but is trying to do better
- Have a connection with Ludica to continue to build, links to The Academy.
- Actually work on gaining influence/sway in the game. Brae is used to being more of a wallflower so trying to do SOMETHING.
-Also trying to make Cazz even more durable, and be able to hit back, if hit.

feeding.method:
Primary Feeding Pool: Intelligence + Subterfuge
Blood Type: Human
Feeding Style: There's a Uni in Parramatta, and just as many tired students, trudging home with too many thoughts in their head. I've got enough experience to pick out one that won't notice anything is off. Love 'em and leave em to totter off home afterwards.

projects.description:
Project Name: A Strange Occurence
Characters involved: Cazz, Lucinda 
Merits & Bonuses: 
XP Spend: n/a
Project description: Cazz and Lucinda met up at UNSW earlier in the month, to talk privately about the shared 'bad vibes' felt across Sydney the month prior. During Court, it was discovered at least three other vampires felt this, across multiple territories. So, who was Cazz not to follow an interesting thing?
Lucinda seems to be better at actual investigations, so, Cazz thought to start with their speciality, dipping into their specific Occult knowledge. And its always good to get a lay of the lines anyway, ey?

projects.desired_outcome: Try to raise Brawl Skill
projects.description:
Project Name: Rough and Tumble
Characters involved: Just Me
Merits & Bonuses: 
XP Spend: 3
Project description: Cazz only really got into fights to see where their limit was in endurance. But now, maybe they can use that to learn how to actually brawl? There's gotta be some mortals who like to throw punches (and surely at least a few who do it for money) or maybe a Kindred that needs to let off some steam? At least lay some groundwork, a good brawler can branch off into many different things.

meta.st_notes: Eivar and Cazz actually DID meet up this month, and, Cazz actually remembered what they wanted to learn. Carthian training style of 'Mobilize Outrage", with the first point being "Stike to Preempt". Cazz hadn't seen how hard Eivar can pack a punch, but oh boy, did they find out with this little training session. Was it a bad thing if Cazz couldn't hide their delight that learning this also was a test of their endurance? They may need to learn how to actually brawl a little though, to put things into practice for themselves...

narrative.travel_description: Conrad takes a taxi back to his appartment. He will use the first level of Obfuscate to appear as somebody unrecognisable as he leaves the building, making it difficult for anyone to track him specifically.
narrative.game_recount:
* EDNA WAS APPOINTED PRIMOGEN IN MY PLACE, AS HER STATUS AS BISHOP ELEVATED HER WITHIN THE COVENANT
* ACTED AS A DECOY DURING THE BID FOR TERRITORY, SPLITTING THE CRONE’S FOCUS AND ALLOWING OUR INVICTUS ALLIES TO TAKE THE HARBOUR
* MADE A SHOW OF SEEMING THAT I WAS MAKING A GENUINE BID FOR THE SHORE IN FRONT OF ALICE VUNDER OF THE CRONE
* BROTHER CARVER SPOKE OF AN ACADEMIC EXCHANGE WITH THE CRONE, I WARNED HIM TO TAKE CARE AND BE MINDFUL OF HERESY, SUGGESTING THAT HE SHARE INFORMATION WITH ME
* APOLOGISED TO ALICE VUNDER OF THE CRONE FOR MY HEIGHTENED SHOW OF ZEALOTRY, AS IT HAD ONLY BEEN A PLOY
narrative.standout_rp: Etsy, for withstanding the fullest extent of abuse he could receive for his impoliteness at Court, and Yusuf, whose costuming and character were impeccable, truly a classic example of a Nosferatu
narrative.ic_correspondence:
Dr Flanders,
It has come to my attention that my Grand Sire, your Sire, Henry St John, First Viscount of Bolingbroke, known colloquially now as 'Keeper', has been greatly wounded by your refusal to correspond with him. He was lamenting this physical and emotional distance between the both of you and I, moved by this display of familial devotion, have sought to remedy your woes. I have given Keeper the address through which you and I have been communicating and am writing this letter to inform you that you shall soon likely be receiving letters from him as well. He has missed you ever so much and I wish only to foster a healthy Sire-Childe relationship. It is as God commanded us - honour thy father.
Your dutiful Childe,
Conrad Sondergaard
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Conrad trusts Brother Carver and Sister Hazel the most, as they all used to work together back in London
narrative.actively_harming_pc: René Meyer - my Carthian rival from London
narrative.aspirations:
* Building my dossier of Court participants, providing a definitive record of Sydney's most important vampires
* Disrupting the work of the Circle and the Carthian Movement
* Ensuring that I may continue to feed from the Docklands territory
* Finding a more suitable ruler for Sydney, ushering in a replacement for the current Premier
* Fostering an alliance between the First and Second Estates
* Keeping tabs on the moral and spiritual health of my covenant and upholding my duties as inquisitor

feeding.method:
Conrad stalks Sydney's streets seeking solitary souls.
Dexterity (3) + Stealth (3) + Stalking (Specialty, Asset) + Auspex (5) = 12

projects.desired_outcome: Learn a secret about the Premier, Eve Lockridge
projects.description:
Project name: The Temptation of Eve, Part Two
Characters involved: Conrad Sondergaard
Merits & Bonuses: -
XP Spend: -
Project description: I've scoped out Lockridge's base of operations, meaning it's time to infiltrate. There's no need to go inside in person when I can do so simply in spirit. I'll project my consciousness and snoop on the Premier's business without her even knowing that I'm there. If I can find any vulnerability, any weakness, then it shall be the stone our Covenant needs to fell Goliath.

Project name: Sniffing Around The Dock Of The Bay
Characters involved: Conrad Sondergaard
Merits & Bonuses: -
XP Spend: -
Project description: Rene St Dominique has been kind enough to award me feeding rights within his territory, so I shall happily repay the favour by making certain that nobody violates his will. I will stalk Sydney's streets by night and, should anyone be found poaching, their presence will be noted and reported to the proper authorities. Of course, if anything else catches my eye, I will be sure to make record of it too.

Characters involved: Conrad Sondergaard
Merits & Bonuses: -
XP Spend: -
Project description: It is time once again to become a productive member of society. I have a job interview with Precision Integrity Services, a private investigation firm in Sydney. If I wish to keep my skills sharp, I'll need to get back into my usual line of work - hone the old mental edge so it grows not dull. A stellar opportunity to maintain my mortal cover, and the worthy work I do uncovering cheating spouses and fraudsters will no doubt help in the Lance's ceaseless crusade against human sin.

* MADE A SHOW OF SEEMING THAT I WAS MAKING A GENUINE BID FOR THE SHORE IN FRONT OF ALICE VUNDER OF THE CRONE
* BROTHER CARVER SPOKE OF AN ACADEMIC EXCHANGE WITH THE CRONE, I WARNED HIM TO TAKE CARE AND BE MINDFUL OF HERESY, SUGGESTING THAT HE SHARE INFORMATION WITH ME
* APOLOGISED TO ALICE VUNDER OF THE CRONE FOR MY HEIGHTENED SHOW OF ZEALOTRY, AS IT HAD ONLY BEEN A PLOY
responses.correspondence:
Dr Flanders,
It has come to my attention that my Grand Sire, your Sire, Henry St John, First Viscount of Bolingbroke, known colloquially now as 'Keeper', has been greatly wounded by your refusal to correspond with him. He was lamenting this physical and emotional distance between the both of you and I, moved by this display of familial devotion, have sought to remedy your woes. I have given Keeper the address through which you and I have been communicating and am writing this letter to inform you that you shall soon likely be receiving letters from him as well. He has missed you ever so much and I wish only to foster a healthy Sire-Childe relationship. It is as God commanded us - honour thy father.
Your dutiful Childe,
Conrad Sondergaard
responses.trust: Conrad trusts Brother Carver and Sister Hazel the most, as they all used to work together back in London
responses.harm: René Meyer - my Carthian rival from London
responses.aspirations:
* Building my dossier of Court participants, providing a definitive record of Sydney's most important vampires
* Disrupting the work of the Circle and the Carthian Movement
* Ensuring that I may continue to feed from the Docklands territory
* Finding a more suitable ruler for Sydney, ushering in a replacement for the current Premier
* Fostering an alliance between the First and Second Estates
* Keeping tabs on the moral and spiritual health of my covenant and upholding my duties as inquisitor
responses.rp_shoutout: ["69da21a09aa8d408d64748f6","for withstanding the fullest extent of abuse he could receive for his impoliteness at Court","and Yusuf","whose costuming and character were impeccable","truly a classic example of a Nosferatu"]
responses.project_1_title: The Temptation of Eve, Part Two
responses.project_1_outcome: Learn a secret about the Premier, Eve Lockridge
responses.project_1_description:
Characters involved: Conrad Sondergaard
Merits & Bonuses: -
Project description: I've scoped out Lockridge's base of operations, meaning it's time to infiltrate. There's no need to go inside in person when I can do so simply in spirit. I'll project my consciousness and snoop on the Premier's business without her even knowing that I'm there. If I can find any vulnerability, any weakness, then it shall be the stone our Covenant needs to fell Goliath.
responses.project_2_title: Sniffing Around The Dock Of The Bay
responses.project_2_outcome: Maintain watch over the Docklands territory, with an emphasis on finding poachers
responses.project_2_description:
Characters involved: Conrad Sondergaard
Merits & Bonuses: -
Project description: Rene St Dominique has been kind enough to award me feeding rights within his territory, so I shall happily repay the favour by making certain that nobody violates his will. I will stalk Sydney's streets by night and, should anyone be found poaching, their presence will be noted and reported to the proper authorities. Of course, if anything else catches my eye, I will be sure to make record of it too.
responses.project_3_outcome: Upkeep my Professional Training (Private Investigator) Merit
responses.project_3_description:
Characters involved: Conrad Sondergaard
Merits & Bonuses: -
Project description: It is time once again to become a productive member of society. I have a job interview with Precision Integrity Services, a private investigation firm in Sydney. If I wish to keep my skills sharp, I'll need to get back into my usual line of work - hone the old mental edge so it grows not dull. A stellar opportunity to maintain my mortal cover, and the worthy work I do uncovering cheating spouses and fraudsters will no doubt help in the Lance's ceaseless crusade against human sin.
responses.project_4_title: Police Let Me Get What I Want
responses.project_4_description:
Characters involved: Conrad Sondergaard
Merits & Bonuses: Contacts (Police)
Project description: Consulting detective Conrad Sondergaard is on the case! The local constabulary are already acquainted with me, so now it's only a matter of making a few friends for life. A little help with an investigation here or there, providing the kind of insight only a Mekhet could, works wonders. It's like I'm practically doing their work for them. What would they have ever done without me?
responses.contact_1_request:
Contact Type: Police
Supporting Info: I heard that a vampire named Charles Mercer Willows was exploiting a church on the Shore
Request: I'd like to know if anyone has come to the police with any information about a man named Charles Mercer Willows - sources say he's some kind of cult leader, so perhaps concerned family have asked them to do something about their indoctrinated kin.
responses.contact_2_request:
Contact Type: Criminal
Supporting Info: I heard that a vampire named Charles Mercer Willows was exploiting a church on the Shore
Request: I'm asking criminals in the North Shore area if they've had any dealings with a Charles Mercer Willows or any cults attached to him. Cults tend to associate with the lowest of the low, finding friends on the outskirts of society.

feeding_review.player_feedback: This should be Obfuscate not Auspex given the relevance to what allows feeding

narrative.travel_description: Maggie and Mac made a point of visibly catching trains and buses to and from Court. They varied their entry and exit points, different stops on the way back than they took on the way there. They employed fieldcraft for the before and after: Doubling back, cutting through blind alleys and abandoned lots. If necessary, they call in minor favours for a Carthian Limo (aka a plain white van with enough bodies in it to make sneaking in with Obfuscate too much of a pain to be worthwhile)
narrative.game_recount:
- Meeting with the Carthians to go over the Carthian experiment 
- Found out that Eve is recording everything?? 
- Working out if the system of Kindred politics and life is what corrupts, or blood potency. Nobody can be allowed to reach BP3
- New Invictus made an arse of himself, got told off by me, then Invictus primogen, then Sack
- Keeper rambled about Carthians protecting poachers. Keep an eye, seems like he might step out of line
- Nominated Renee for first Regent of Second City, and secured that for the Carthians. She'll step aside when asked to, so she's a safe first choice. And if she doesn't, she's an easy enough takedown
- Made sure that all Regents knew that they'd be held to account for sins against the city in their territory.
narrative.standout_rp: Yusuf, for the costume. And Daniel, for being a good sport about being stomped!
narrative.ic_correspondence:
Comrade,

Grim has crawled back into whatever hell will have him, and may it keep him there. I'll keep an eye, but from the caginess of the Lance, I doubt his return will be soon. Court was a snakepit but we pushed through- meetings, scheming, territory shuffling. The usual nonsense. Secured a territory for the Movement, with a Regent who ought to be malleable enough where it counts. Still I wonder: how do we make sure we don't become that which we detest? How can I stop the Movement from calcifying into cut-price Invictus? Can it be done? 

Hope. What an awful concept. How dreadful, at my age, to have found it again. 

Keep the home fires burning.

Doc
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Macheath, implicitly and without question. Yusuf and Renee, conditionally.
narrative.actively_harming_pc: Conrad Sondergaard
narrative.aspirations:
Short term: Build knowledge and influence of all territories of Sydney to support holding the Regents to account. 

Medium term- Protect our territory of the Second City, and be prepared to respond with overwhelming force in the event of disruption

Long term- Overthrow the system of Praxis and install a council of equal representation, preventing Sydney from becoming Belfast Mark Two. No gods, no masters, no regents

feeding.method: Maggie finds a pub or a bar with good music and bad lighting, finds someone who looks like they could use a bit of luck, and buys the first round. By the end of the night they've had a grand, if blurry time, she's had what she came for, and everyone walks out under their own steam. Using Manipulation + Empathy

projects.action_type_raw: Feed: Dedicate extra time to feeding🩸
projects.desired_outcome: Feed safely and without breaching the Masquerade; do not show up to Court hungry.
projects.description:
Project name: Just Go For the One 
Characters involved: Doc
Merits: N/A
XP: N/A
Project description: I found.a quiet pub with decent music and dim light, and a gent who looks like he could use a listening ear. I really only had to buy the first round: after that, he was all lured to have someone to chat to. By the end of the night, he'd had a grand night he couldn't quite remember, and I'd had my fee- and everyone walked out on their own two feet.

projects.action_type_raw: Patrol/Scout: Attempt to monitor a given Territory or area 👀
projects.desired_outcome: To conduct a thorough patrol of the Academy, and gather information about areas of need in that territory that might either match or contradict my existing information.
projects.description:
Project Name: Keeping it Tight
Characters involved: Me and Mac (Also: Jack, Keeper, Anichka, Cyrus) 
Merits and Bonuses: N/A
XP Spent: N/A
Project Description: I’ve been invited by Jack to patrol the Academy for poachers and interlopers, which I’ll certainly do, but what I’m really interested in is information. Last month I learned from my political contacts that the Academy is ‘on the radar’. I’d like to see if there’s anything I could match to that information. Any places that look like they could use the investment of the Covenant that’s to be looking after this territory. And especially, anything that directly contradicts the information that I already have. All this with an eye to being able to make intelligent, evidenced recommendations to Jack next Court.

projects.action_type_raw: XP Spend: Grow your character 🌱
projects.desired_outcome: To gain the first dot in Animalism and the first dot of Animal Ken
projects.description:
Project Name: Call of the Wild 
Characters involved: Doc
Merits and Bonuses: 
XP Spend: 5
Project Description: In a city where the walls have ears and the rats have masters, I’m currently flying blind and I don't care for the sensation. I’m putting aside the curated poise of Majesty to revisit the grim, visceral lessons my Kyris spat at me decades ago regarding the "lesser" pulses of the city. I’ll be spending my nights in the Second City’s neglected corners, studying the behaviour of the local strays and quieting my own mind until I can hear theirs. If the other covenants are weaponizing the vermin, I need to know how to read the tracks they leave behind. Information is the only currency that matters here, and it’s time I started collecting it from the things that see everything and say nothing.

projects.description:
Project Name: Preventative Care
Characters Involved: Doc
Merits + Bonuses: Professional training bonus
XP Spent: N/A
Project Description: Having made a habit of donating a few nights of my time to the free clinic, and seen the change that brought, I'm not likely to stop now. But healing the man is no use if I send him back home to starve. The people who live in the city know it's needs best, so that's what my bedside listening ear is trained on this month. Which landlords are squeezing their tenants? Which streets aren't safe for Kine to walk down? I want the people I treat to feel heard, and seen, and cared for.

meta.st_notes:
There once was a doctor of night
Who’d heard of a rave out of sight
From the Bar to the lawn
She partied till dawn
And no more with the Crone she will fight! 

(Attended a rave with the Crone the night before Court, at Manning Bar) 

There once was a doctor called Kane
Invited, but not by her name
To a high brow affair
She was glad of a chair
Sure, and plus-ones, they all are the same...

(Attended Brandy's dinner party as Mac's plus-one)

feeding_review.player_feedback: Majesty would have been viable here. We assumed to add the Confidant specialisation, but we recommend you add it next time. The next downtime form should make it easier

projects_resolved.player_feedback: A dice pool needs to be an Attribute + Skill. I would have been happy with either Manipulation or Presence as the Attribute.

narrative.travel_description: She is driven via backstreets as much as possible by her ghoul who has been instructed to take full turns around blocks whenever a car takes too many of the same turns behind them.
narrative.game_recount:
Schemed to have the Lance take up residence in The Port while ensuring that [Symon's character] did not take regency
Gave status to Sister Hazel
Nightmared a character for not taking no from a Lance character for an answer
narrative.standout_rp: Brandy LaRoux
narrative.ic_correspondence:
Dear Arthur,

Not much time to write this month as I am busy finally settling in. I've found a lovely little spot that backs on to the headlands at Malabar. I think they're using it for a rifle range but I'm sure I can make it work to suit my needs.

Hope Ellen is well, and yourself.

- Edna
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Sister Hazel
narrative.actively_harming_pc: [Symon's character]
narrative.aspirations:
Monitor Eve Lockridge to see if she needs nudging towards self destruction or if she will lead herself there

Have the Lance gain power with non-court attending vampires in Sydney to increase our influence should the time come.

feeding.method:
Wits 3 + Larceny 2 + Subterfuge 2

Edna feeds on people stumbling home drunk. Consuming alcohol is against LDS health codes, she justifies this form of feeding as physically removing the sin-washed blood from a straggler's body. Deep hood drawn, she swipes their wallets as they shift around other passengers departing trains, follows them just far enough before asking them, "Excuse me sir, does this wallet belong to you?"

projects.description:
Project Name: His Many Houses (ii)
Characters involved: Only Edna
Merits & Bonuses:
XP Spend: n/a
Project description: Able now to cast her visage (Familiar Stranger) as one that resembles a more delightsome her, Edna spends this month dipping her toes back in to her sociable pre-fang self. While she visits churces in The Port on quiet early-week nights this month, she makes sure that she speaks briefly with an attendee each time before leaving - making a point of adding a reasonable donation each time to the collection

projects.description:
Project Name: Makeshift Stewardship (i)
Characters involved: Just Edna
Merits & Bonuses: n/a
XP Spend: n/a
Project description: Tracksuit pants feel utterly repulsive for Edna to be wearing for her patrol, but Brayden seems entirely sure this is what she should wear should she be spotted by any kine as she "jogs" around. But she pulls both the tracksuit pants and sweater that Brayden brought home from a charity shop on all the same. She's still not familiar with this city, and she assumes he must be right, being young and all.

She decides that while everybody is settling in, it would be a good time to nosy about and see if she has any new kindred neighbours from court. You can take the girl out of the small town, and you can even make the small town a large city over the course of a century, but you can never take the small town out of the girl.

Characters involved: Just Edna
Merits & Bonuses: n/a
Project description: Tracksuit pants feel utterly repulsive for Edna to be wearing for her patrol, but Brayden seems entirely sure this is what she should wear should she be spotted by any kine as she "jogs" around. But she pulls both the tracksuit pants and sweater that Brayden brought home from a charity shop on all the same. She's still not familiar with this city, and she assumes he must be right, being young and all.
She decides that while everybody is settling in, it would be a good time to nosy about and see if she has any new kindred neighbours from court. You can take the girl out of the small town, and you can even make the small town a large city over the course of a century, but you can never take the small town out of the girl.

notes_thread.text:
AM Note: Primary method is deception, suggests Wits + Subterfuge. 
KW Note: Feeding pool uses 2 skills, poor pool.

feeding_review.player_feedback: Kurtis rebuilt your sheet to be a monster. Empathy or even Intimidation would be a much better dice pool. Especially since both have specialisations; Additionally Majesty or Nightmare are good choices too.

projects_resolved.player_feedback: Obfuscate would not really apply here

narrative.travel_description: Einar is getting about by public transport for the time being - learning the routes through the city, and how the people move. He gets off at random stops a couple of times, and waits for the next bus or train heading in the same direction - keeping an eye out for anybody who does the same more than once.
narrative.game_recount:
- Discussed the Eldrich inclement weather and rat plague with Maggie, Mac, and Caz. They are all concerned about the potential danger to the Masquerade that this obvious Blood Magic poses.
- Met the new Carthian Nosferatu, Yusuf. He is strange but may be a valuable asset if his boasting about his assets and abilities hold true.
- Learned that one of the mortals I beat into unconsciousness at Cyrus club remembered my face, and gave a description to the cops which resulted in an accurate sketch of my mug. Brandy "took care of it" through her contacts, apparently, and didn't even ask anything in return. That is pretty suspicious.
- The Premier informed us of her plans for the City. The Carthian's seem mostly on board for it.
- Was voted to be 2IC of the Ventrue Council in Carver's absence and then announced to be a valued member of the court, increasing my city status by Brandy at the end of the night.
narrative.standout_rp: Daniel, the new player in the Red Suit who played "Etsy". It was his first game, and he played pretty hard and loose, copped a lot of shit, and took it like a champ.
narrative.ic_correspondence:
Lord X (Sire to Premier Evangeline)

The Kindred of the City are settling into their new home. Your Childe appears to be acquitting herself well - establishing connections, making friends and... "allies".
Regents have been selected, and territories established - I expect that the fairly amicable relationships between the Covenants may soon be tested once the Kindred begin to find themselves more comfortable, or less so.
Though the shadow war that appears to be happening between the Crone and the Sanctum seems to have caused some anomalies that put pressure on the sanctity of the Masquerade - for now, your investments seem secure, and your Childe may yet earn my respect on her own merits before the expiry of the terms of our agreement.

- E
narrative.most_trusted_pc:
Einar trusts that Rene has his back - but her history and attitudes toward some other Kindred may get her, and drag Einar into trouble that he did not ask for.

Cyrus is about as trustworthy a Kindred as Einar knows. He does at least seem to have his back if he gets into trouble.
narrative.actively_harming_pc:
Brandy is a problem. Though she has actively helped Einar, her complete lack of interest in accepting any kind of repayment for covering up his mistake, only to then elevate his city status - she is either in love with Einar, overly keen to serve the Premier, or she is up to something nefarious that Einar cannot quite name yet. Einar is not necessarily looking to harm Brandy, but he is starting to feel that he needs some kind of leverage.

Reed Justice is also problematic. Einar has developed an amicable relationship with him, but his confirmation to the Ventrue council that he is "that" kind of Ventrue when Einar suggested that the Ventrue as a courtesy should "stay out of each other's heads" makes him to Einar's mind one of the most dangerous Kindred in the City. Again, while Einar is not actively trying to harm Reed, he is extremely wary, and keen to find some kind of leverage.
narrative.aspirations:
- Establish a home around the Harbour to be close to the ocean.

- Find a warehouse to utilize carpentry skills and begin constructing a boat after the fashion of the ones Einar used to sail in his youth.

- Keep Evangeline alive for at least 6 months to fulfil my contract with her Sire, then revisit how alive Evangeline needs to be after that time.

feeding.method:
Feeding Pool: Strength 3 (5 with Vigor passive) + Brawl 5 + Vigor 2 = 12

Blood Type: Human

Feeding Style: Einar is going to stalk the seediest pubs, clubs and bars - finding only the most intoxicated of individuals and ambushing them as they stumble home in the dark.

ST note - For Territories below, I was not sure what to put for "Resident" and "Poaching" as I have secured feeding rights with the relevant Regents of both the Second City (Rene) and The Harbour (Reed Justice), which means I am not technically poaching if I feed in either so I just put both down as "Resident". 

I arranged those feeding rights as I was labouring under the misapprehension that one's Haven needed to be inside one of the Regency districts, and I wanted to Haven in the Harbour district to be near the ocean. This is probably not necessary now, but I am rolling with it, and it has been fun making deals, compromises, and manipulations to ensure I am welcome in Mr Justices' district.

projects.desired_outcome: Patrol the second City, keeping an eye out for poachers, interlopers, and ne'er-do-wells.
projects.description:
Project Name: "Eye in the Sky"

Characters involved: Just me.

Merits & Bonuses: Acute Sense, Protean beast form (Raven)

XP Spend: N/A

Project description: 
Einar aims to take the form of a Raven using his Protean discipline and keep an eye on the Carthian's territory in the Second City from the sky. 

Should he discover somebody getting up to something they shouldn't be, he will follow and watch taking note of who they are, what they are doing, and where they go - but not make any moves against them at this time. He would try to ensure that any trespassers do become aware that a creepy, black bird is obviously watching them and even appears to shakes its head in disapproval before flying away.

Project Name: “Drinking a cup of Concrete”

Characters involved: Just me

Merits & Bonuses: N/A

XP Spend: 4

Project description: 
Einar avails himself of some of the many 24 hour gyms that seem to be omnipresent around the city. Lifting weights, punching bags, and occasionally feeding on roided-out gym junkies if and when the opportunity presents itself - he pushes his undead flesh to its limits, thickening the blood as he focuses his mind and body to develop his vampiric gifts of strength.

projects.description:
Project Name: "Watcher over the Water"

Characters involved: Just me.

Merits & Bonuses: Acute Sense, Protean beast form (Raven)

XP Spend: N/A

Project description: 
Einar has secured feeding rights in The Harbour from Reed Justice as he wishes to have access to the Harbour and has already made efforts in the area.

Once again in the form of a Raven using his Protean discipline, Einar plans to watch over The Harbour district from the sky. Similarly to Project 1 - Should he discover somebody getting up to something they shouldn't be, he will follow and watch taking note of who they are, what they are doing, and where they go - but not make any moves against them at this time. He would try to ensure that any trespassers do become aware that a creepy, black bird is obviously watching them and even appears to shake its head in disapproval before flying away.

It should be noted that Einar does not know who has or hasn't been granted feeding rights in the area - so he does intend to just make a list of everybody feeding in the district and sort them all out later.

meta.st_notes:
- Casimir has reached out to Einar to ask for help in learning the Carthian style merit of "Mobilize Outrage", which Einar is more than happy to assist them in. With the first rank being "Strike to Preempt", he would teach them how to focus their righteous anger into a focal point, controlling that rage and unleashing it on an opponent without tempting the Beast. He would probably need to show the technique to Caz a few times by using it on them - he knows they can handle it, and he would not utilize his claws for such demonstrations / training.

- After his feeding debacle last month, Einar will be keen to get back out for a night on the town, having a good time with Cyrus and Teegan, but keeping his fangs to himself while in company - just grooving, grinding, and loving the night life.

- Einar is seeking a late night “Men’s Shed” style activity where he might be able to socialize with a group of (potentially overly) accommodating men / social workers, practice some of his carpentry skills, and engage with those things that he enjoyed as a mortal.

meta.lore_questions:
Protean at level 3 allows you to hold 1 animal form for each dot of Protean you possess and says that you take on the physical characteristics of the animal - but I have been unable to find stats for animals in any book or online resource that I can locate. Having started game with Protean 4, is there a way that I can declare, and is there any discussion that we should have about what animal forms my character might possess? I have utilized a Raven in my downtimes, but with Protean 4, and in keeping with the theme of a Viking Pirate I was hoping for Einar to also have access to some themati animal transformations - a Wolf, a Shark, and potentially a Bear (Berserker literally meaning "Bear-Skin") - but I don’t know what that would look like from a rules perspective.

Also, I wanted to ask how we would assign damage negation from the Resistance discipline. Given the alteration to the way that weapon damage is working, characters may be dealing multiple damage types, so I was wondering which damage will be negated first? For example, if I took 2 Lethal, and 3 Bashing damage and I wanted to spend Vitae to negate damage with my Resistance - would I be required to negate all the bashing damage before moving on to the Lethal? Or would I negate the Lethal damage first so that I am only taking bashing damage?
meta.form_comments: I have found the multiple separations of elements of the projects to be difficult to track, and I am honestly not sure if I have put everything in the right place. I am sure it makes it easier for you guys to isolate the information for your records, so I am sure I can deal with it, and will get used to it, but I have struggled to be certain I am looking at the right thing.

narrative.travel_description: Ivana travels with Charlie (likely under his Obfuscate). She will use Auspex abilities to make sure nothing bad is happening/suss out any concealed threats such as general shitbags, Obfuscated vampires or other hidden supernaturals.
narrative.game_recount:
* Was asked a lot of questions by Mac, then Doc about the 'magic storm and all the rats' at The Port. Gave her 'expert opinion' on the behaviour of rats, and promised to 'investigate' and pass any info to the Carthians.
* After Eve's speech and Carver's questions, Ivana mouthed at Carver, "I don't think she answered your question?" and he mouthed, "Later," so Ivana found him and they had a chat. Carver promised to teach Ivana if she wanted, and offered to let her keep books in his library. She asked him about magic storms, and he told her old, powerful Lance could do it. She reported that back to Mac and Doc. Mac acknowledged that he had seen the Gangrel Lance, in the area, and appeared willing to cast the blame on Kirk. Ivana did not disagree.
* Doc told Ivana a lovely story about how she and Mac had helped a human girl one day, because Doc and Mac do not like bad men. Ivana was overwhelmed with happiness that her friends Doc and Mac "won" and was very excited to show Doc that she had bullet wounds in her tummy too, just like the girl in the story they helped. What a coincidence!
* Ivana had a conversation with PremiEve because she wanted to know what PremiEve meant when she talked about investments and things. It was very enlightening for Ivana - and based on her understanding of how the Masquerade works, Ivana is pretty sure Eve just confessed to breaking the Masquerade... Ivana did not let any hint of this show on her face during the conversation, and has not discussed this IC with anyone. (Let me know if you want the context).
* During this conversation, Ivana also asked a bunch of other questions of PremiEve - the hows and whys of the Court, and what the Kindred do for her. She specifically asked why Rene was writing people's names down at the door, and PremiEve said it was so she could know everyone who was there. Ivana said she already knew everyone in the Court, and PremiEve said that maybe Ivana should have Rene's job. Ivana went and asked Rene what she did for a job for PremiEve, because PremiEve had offered Ivana Rene's job, and she didn't want to do it if it was boring or hard. Rene was naturally pissed off, and Ivana just shrugged and suggested they both go talk to PremiEve, which was totally a fine and not awkward or uncomfortable conversation for PremiEve, and Ivana left partway through the conversation, because she got bored.
narrative.standout_rp: Our three newbies - I didn't get to interact with Daniel directly, but I observed awesome interactions. And Archer - Carver gave a really refreshing view of the Lancea that was still aligned with how they should be played, yet he provided a contrast to the rest of the characters Ivana has met. It changed her perception of the Lance and she was more willing to engage with them... And then she met Conrad... lol
narrative.ic_correspondence:
Charlie says I should keep writing things down in a book, but I don't have a book. It is easy to find scraps of paper, or bits of cardboard in the trash though, so I will do that.

I don't like that people were upset about the rats at The Port. I thought we were making it lovely for the rats, but everyone is worried and says we did something wrong. I don't think Charles told me the truth when he asked me to help. 

Someone else wrote in my paper last time. I think. I'm not sure. "You noticed the right thing." It is almost my writing. But not quite. I copied it a bunch, and it is just a little different. I am glad I noticed the right thing, but I notice many things - so which one was the Me-Or-Not-Me noticing? I think it was that I noticed that the woman-bird from the Crone ritual didn't know - but now I feel like I don't know. 

I told Charlie about the woman near the water. But I don't know what else to tell. I don't want to go back to the water, just in case people blame me for the magic thunderstorm, or the rats. But I want to know about her. I told Anichka too, because Anichka said that something was rising in the water and it was angry. I just want to help. I asked Anichka if it made me bad that I didn't tell Charlie about the woman. She said it didn't make me bad, but I should think about whether it will be unsafe for Charlie to not know. She said that I am allowed to have my own knowledge and mysteries, and that I am my own person, no matter what anyone thinks, and I get to make decisions about what I tell other people. I told Charlie this, and he agreed and said that we would do all of that together, and that felt nice. Which makes me worry. 

Why am I so broken.
narrative.most_trusted_pc:
Unquestioning trust: Charlie and Keeper.
High level of trust: Anichka, Cyrus, Doc, Mac
Trusts because she's told she should: The Crone as a collective, Eve, The Invictus
narrative.actively_harming_pc: No one, currently. She is still observing, however, she does seek to deflect blame away from herself and/or other Crone activities where possible - she doesn't have a specific target however, and usually just flames the suspicions presented to her (ala Kirk).
narrative.aspirations: Ivana just wants to learn how this particular place works, and learn everything she can about the kindred of Sydney. She is sticking close to Charlie and Keeper, and keeping herself as hidden as possible. The Court must only see the Child... For now.

Blood Type: Human.
Feeding Style: Does her best "lost waif", "damsel in distress" or "I'm an unsuspecting, helpless female walking down this dark alleyway" impression, luring food into dark alleys or parts of town to have a quick and quiet snack.

projects.description:
Project Name: You Know I Speak City...
Characters involved: Ivana
Merits & Bonuses: 
XP Spend: 0
Project description: Ivana leaves her home with Charlie and Keeper, but pauses a moment bite into the fleshy pad of her hand, and then crouch down to fondly pat the pavement, murmuring to it. From Night Horrors (pg. 44) "By spending a Vitae and resting one or both hands on a building exterior or paved street within the city, the Harbinger renews her link to Her. Most Harbingers do this upon exiting their havens nightly. Harbingers may not be linked to more than one city at a time. In the case of a metropolis, the Harbinger is linked to the greater metropolis and not a given neighborhood: She is not Fishtown, She is Philadelphia. A
Scion must attune a city before she can use any of her other Devotions in it."

ritual_casting.casting:
Ritual Name/Level: Blood Witness L2
Caster/s: Ivana
Target/s: Court Location - the Hub Theatre in Newtown
Duration: 1 night. 
Effects and page reference: Smear Vitae on an area. Remotely observe through the spilled blood for one day per extra Vitae spent. (VTR: Coteries, p. 84 but put in pg 86 when you use the PDF. It is 1 dot ritual, but it is 2 dots on my sheet - probably because conversion things, I think, Symon?)
Vitae/Willpower Spent: 3

Ivana would like to arrive at the Court location before everyone else does, as discussed with the Crone, so she can set up 'security'. Charlie would likely be with her. Ivana would like to use 1 Vitae to smear some blood around the ballroom, in unobtrusive locations, like the underside of tables, or chairs (especially where PremiEve will sit), and she would rub some into any locks/padlocks/keyholes - logic being that if she is able to get some stuck in a nook or cranny, a little may remain, even if the rest is wiped away. Ivana would do the same in the 'private meeting space', again in the lock of the door and on the underside of a chair, and a smear on any external doorways, just in case. Happy for y'all to rejig this, if it feels too much - am going on the whole 'one location' thing, but 1 vitae per room. 

Be prepared for, "Keeper, I'm hungry."

meta.st_notes:
Some of the Crone are expecting Ivana to show up and attend the shared DT Action "Project Name: We Own the Night." Ivana will not be showing up, as she will be required to Patrol with Charlie, much to her chagrin. She will be framing it to the Crone as, "Well SOMEONE had to patrol the territory while you were all out getting jiggy wit it." And be a petulant moody teenager about it all. Lyn has not advised anyone Ivana will not be attending.

The Crone are hosting next Court. Ivana has extended the following offer: “Mr Jack, I can make the security for our hosting of Court. And I can also stand at the door and write down the name of everyone who comes. Will that be helpful?” Mr Jack says that will be helpful. Ivana's version of security does not require anything other than people to answer a couple of questions upon entry... And for Charlie to show up. 

Ivana is going to be scrounging through the dump, bags left outside charity bins, and looking through all manner of back alleys, trash bins and such in order to try and find an 'outfit' for the very important party - aka the Crone Rave and Hunt that she isn't going to show up to... I don't believe me showing up in a new costume will require a DT, because I'm not expending any skills or anything, but let me know if it should have, and I will either have Ivana just show up in her usual nightie, or I'll ride out whatever consequences may arise as a result of careless forraging. She is going to show up in the 'outfit' she had planned to wear to thr Rave/Hunt, which is likely going to be a Batman or Catwoman outfit... Probably Catwoman. Meow.
meta.xp_spend:
XP Claimed: 3 (+4 sitting on sheet = 7XP for spending)
Total XP Spent: 5
Project 1:
Project 2:
Project 3: 
Project 4:
Free Spend: Stealth (Hide) 1 = 2 XP, and then Obfuscate 3 = 3 XP
Smol narrative flavour for you... 
Ivana has always been good at being completely overlooked, ignored or not seen. Charlie and Keeper always see her though, but she's good, and useful, and wants to help. She's seen Charlie hide so good, and she looks up to him so much, so of course she is going to try and emulate him... Even if there is a part of her (which she'll deny) that wants to be better. So, she did the only thing she could think of; playing hide and seek. Charlie and Keeper eventually began to humour her and 'play' with her, likely after the third or fourth time she popped out of a cupboard, or from within a broken couch or pile of trash. She only tried at home though, she wasn't brave enough to do it outside yet. She played a lot, figuring out where the best spots were to hide, but still see everything, seeing how long it took her to hide completely, and how long it took her to hide competely silently... how close she could pad up behind Charlie and Keeper unnoticed and poke them... What began as a game became something sharper, more deliberate, as she pushed herself to stay hidden longer and more completely.

One night playing 'murder in the dark' with Charlie, she went too far, by accident. She hid, and he couldn’t find her at all. Charlie was looking long enough that he actually began to believe that she had left the haven... Ivana was quite pleased with herself, until he revealed her hiding spot and looked straight through her, closing it up again. She realised he couldn't see her. Charlie's concern grew, as Ivana's panic began to rapidly spike, and it didn't take much for her to completely breakdown in hysterics. The hysterics allowed Charlie to find where she was, realised what she had done, and calmly coax her back. She was very sorry and didn't do it on purpose, and she didn't want him to be mad, but he shushed her. 

Since then, they’ve worked at it together, trying to make it controlled. Ivana can reach for that absence now, step out of sight and mind with focus. She still worries though, when she disappears, that maybe she won't make it back... But the more she practices, the more she gets comfortable with shrouding herself in darkness. She's a Shadow too, you know... Just like Charlie.
meta.form_comments: The page 16 out of 16 was initially overwhelming, and the order of things threw me a lil, but my brain is my brain. The "if this, then this" formatting of sections made it easier, and I'll get used to the format, and I can see how this will help y'all with the data crunch. I think once people get used to it, it'll be good.
