The Crone are hosting next Court. Ivana has extended the following offer: “Mr Jack, I can make the security for our hosting of Court. And I can also stand at the door and write down the name of everyone who comes. Will that be helpful?” Mr Jack says that will be helpful. Ivana's version of security does not require anything other than people to answer a couple of questions upon entry... And for Charlie to show up. 

Ivana is going to be scrounging through the dump, bags left outside charity bins, and looking through all manner of back alleys, trash bins and such in order to try and find an 'outfit' for the very important party - aka the Crone Rave and Hunt that she isn't going to show up to... I don't believe me showing up in a new costume will require a DT, because I'm not expending any skills or anything, but let me know if it should have, and I will either have Ivana just show up in her usual nightie, or I'll ride out whatever consequences may arise as a result of careless forraging. She is going to show up in the 'outfit' she had planned to wear to thr Rave/Hunt, which is likely going to be a Batman or Catwoman outfit... Probably Catwoman. Meow.
responses.form_feedback: The page 16 out of 16 was initially overwhelming, and the order of things threw me a lil, but my brain is my brain. The "if this, then this" formatting of sections made it easier, and I'll get used to the format, and I can see how this will help y'all with the data crunch. I think once people get used to it, it'll be good.

notes_thread.text:
AM Note: Description suggests Manipulation + Subterfuge + Obfuscate or Expression instead of Subterfuge. She has 0 in both. Empathy does not fit the described method. 
W Note: Need to explain the difference between a power used in an action and a power used in a pool.

feeding_review.player_feedback: We understand this as reading people for the mark, which makes Empathy viable. If so, we will use Auspex

narrative.travel_description:
To and From court same but in reverse.
- drives car to train station a couple of stops away from the one closest to court
- uses predatory aura fully off, with OBS 1 (Face in the Crowd). 
- uses Beast's Hackles (Auspex 1) to check for threats, such as hidden spying kindred or other supernaturals to make sure he isn't being followed. If he is, then he goes to the next stop to try to lose them and circle back. Otherwise, he gets out and leaves the station. Once unobserved on a quiet side street, he uses his Celerity to zip quickly to Court or back to his car. 
Before driving back to his haven from where he parked it, Jack raised his Beast's Hackles one last time to detect threats, he can then enjoy a relaxed drive, moon roof open, to reflect on the events of Court before making his way back to the area where he has his haven. He then uses Celerity again to close distance close to his haven before quietly slipping in to wind down before sunrise.
narrative.game_recount:
- antagonised members of the Lancea Sanctum
- Negotiated with Premier Eve (with successful Lay Open the Mind to gain insights into Eve's intentions/desires) to align the Crone with Carthians against the Lancea and support her Premiership in return for support of Crone Regencies in The Academy (and also the Shore)
- Secured Regency of The Academy
- coordinated Crone kindred feeding across the Shore and Academy
- Attempted to negotiate giving feeding privileges to Mac (Carthian) in exchange for providing added security in The Academy.
narrative.standout_rp: Wonderful RP with Mac (Carthian), sharing our mutual antipathy towards the Lancea Sanctum
narrative.ic_correspondence:
Sire, 

I am pleased to report that, within this fledgling Court led by an ambitious Carthian, I have assumed the role of Regent of a rich feeding ground in the city, which I have taken some efforts to curate. The land here is rich, with deep roots that reach longingly for the Mother. Soon, all kindred within my district shall feel her beating heart and know that I watch from every shadow. 

I shall heed your advice and carry out a proper diagnosis before attempting to adjust the Lens. Inspired by your example, I shall attempt my first detournement to expand my sight across the district and deeper connection to its desires. I look forward to sharing news of this experience with you soon.

Blessings upon your Scars, 

J.F.
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Cyrus Reynolds
narrative.actively_harming_pc: No one specifically, yet.
narrative.aspirations:
Short Term: [Become Regent of The Academy - Achieved] Consolidate my control as Regent of The Academy and sustain it as a Verdant feeding ground
Medium Term: Improve my Cruac and Detournement skills
Long Term: Transform Sydney into a Crone Domain with a Crone Prince

regency.regency_action:
Through my direct actions and Occult Allies, I add my own voice to the cacophony of whispers throughout The Academy.

Those who are able should know that something has changed. They need only: 
- listen to the silence behind the noise to hear the throbbing flow of the Mother's blood; 
- reach out to feel the caress of shadows that glide through the night; and 
- gaze into the darkness, to know that it is always watching. 

The Great Unwashed should understand that a Mekhet Crone Regent has settled in to listen and observe from the shadows, spinning his web across The Academy with reverence and devotion. While in The Academy, they are within a living altar in the Shadow of the Mother. This may draw some close; and push others away. The Academy is being tuned to create a discordant harmony -- clashing wills that resonate as a unified whole. All are welcome, if they are prepared to join the Chorus.

feeding.method:
Primary Feeding Pool: Wits + Stealth + Auspex 
Blood Type: Human
Feeding Style: Stealth/Ambush

I hunt Kine late at night that are leaving one of the many pubs throughout The Academy as they walk through quiet streets, lanes or Parks in Camperdown, Newtown or Glebe. I use Face in the Crowd to stalk my victim; and I use the Kiss and Auspex to ensure compliance and discretion. 

NOTE: Please refer to shared DT action (We Own the Night -- Rave feed) that occurs on the night prior to Court.

projects.action_type_raw: Misc: For things that don't fit in other catagories 🤷‍♂️

primary_pool.expression: Cruac + Occult + Presence + Expression + Manipulation + Auspex [??] + Team Assist

projects.desired_outcome: See below (group action)
projects.description:
Project Name: We Own the Night
Characters involved: Jack, Cyrus, Anichka, Keeper, Brandy, Alice, Charles, Ivana
Merits & Bonuses: Mantle of Amrous Fire + Viral Mythology + Cacophony Savvy
XP Spend: n/a

Project description (common):
Ritual Casting a variation of 'Mantle of the Predator Goddess'. 
As with Mantle of Amorous Fire, Acolytes dance themselves into a trance during the entire casting of this ritual and adopt the Blush of Life. They each must spend a point of Willpower to rise from the exhaustion. Once cast, the Acolytes flow with the grace of a perfect predator for the rest of the night. The Kine all but beg for their attention, stumbling into vulnerable positions with a subconscious prayer to prostrate themselves on her altar. The Acolytes are worshiped as Gods during the Rave. 
The vibe of this party permeates The Academy.

Desired outcome of Ritual (from common effort): 
Blush of Life for the night (Alice's contribution)
+4 to Feeding Pool at game start (Keeper's contribution)
Feeding Roll will be Rote as well (Anichka's contribution)
Add their Cruac dots to Presence for court (Charles's contribution)
Everyone gets the Inspired Condition towards showing off the Crones power and presence at Court (Brandy's contribution)
Feed with impunity (Ivanna's contribution)
Worshiped as Rave Gods (Cyrus's contribution)
Spreading thought out the Regency (Jack's contribution)

(personal contribution)
Jack leads the ritual and dance on the floor, while Cyrus drives the beat and other Acolytes join in. He channels his Mantle of Amorous Fire to bring the Acolytes on the dance floor into a synergised frenzy of motion and blood. A contagious awe encompasses the gathered Kine (viral mythology) to surrender to the shared Divinity of the assembled Acolytes (and guest kindred?). They become part of the Chorus. When the event is completed, gorged with the blood of adoring Kine, he spreads the feeling of ecstatic release and surrender throughout the district to shapes the vibe of the district (cacophany savvy). 

NOTE (protecting the Masquerade): In DT1, Jack successfully activated backdoor access to CCTV security systems at USyd (Manning Bar included). Recordings of the dance floor and rest of the venue are put on a loop prior to the start of the ritual -- not hard to do since raves are deliriously repetitive... A true feed of these CCTVs is sent directly to Jack (via Eye Behind the Glass) and saved to the cloud, which he will edit and upload for the Moulding Room later.

projects.description:
Project Name: Keeping it Tight!
Characters Involved: Me (and Keeper, Anichka, Cyrus, Doc, Mac)
Merits & Bonuses: Eye Behind the Lens
Xp Spend: n/a for most; 2xp for Jack to learn Devotion
Project Description (common): 
The Academy is actively patrolled to keep out poachers or interlopers, and to reinforce the Masquerade with the Great Unwashed. Let it be known by all that Court has been established, and a Regent chosen for this district who watches from every shadow. Kindred may pass through, quickly and without stopping -- but pause for too long at your peril!

Jack's personal contribution:
Jack supplements his patrolling through Astral Projection (Auspex 5) with Heightened Senses (Auspex 1) by learning and applying his first Moulding Room detournement (Eye Behind the Glass) -- See DT3. This should enhance his ability to surveil his District as he can rapidly move to places of interest within the District.

projects.description:
Project Name: An Eye for 
Characters involved: just me
Merits & Bonuses: n/a
XP spend: 2xp

Learns his first detournement, Moulding Room devotion (2xp)

Having observed his Sire carry out this ritual on several occasions, Jack decides it is now time. He cuts out his eye and attaches it with vitae to the lens of a video camera through which he can observe multiple feeds to expand his patrols of The Acadmey.

He does this specifically on the night before court (support DT2 Project 1) to be able to observe all actual security feeds during the Rave. He maintains that detournement for Court (DT Project 4) to watch the feed he installs in the camera on the ceiling.

projects.action_type_raw: Hide/Protect: Attempt to secure actions, merits, holdings, or projects 🫣
projects.desired_outcome: Jack gains insights about the Court
projects.description:
Project Name: The Panopticon
Characters involved: Just me
Merits & Bonuses: Trained Observer
XP spend: n/a
Project Description: 

Jack has been tasked with securing the venue for Court on April 18th. He applies his skills as a director to surveil Court. 

Through his High Society Allies, he negotiates permission from the owner (acquired for $25M in 2024) of a The Hub Theatre (shuttered and closed in 1996) on King Street in Newtown to allow him to put on a small exhibit for a dry run of a private viewing (Court), which he intends to repeat as an extended special exhibit during next DT for high society members (Moulding Room shenanigans). 

[full description of Court setup will be sent to STs] 
The Exhibit consists of projectors with small screens and seats arranged around the art deco ballroom of the theatre profiling visual media over the past century of the Theatre's history -- vaudeville, silent movies, early black and white, colorised film, porn productions in the 70s/80s, and ultimately nothing from ~1996 onwards. The Final Exhibit shows a live feed, top down, of a camera with a LENSBABY Composer 2 Pro Bending Camera Lens mounted on the ceiling that shows the movement of Kindred around the ballroom, blurred focus around the edges by clear focus on the centre -- which is where the central seat for the Premier is located. [Primary dice pool to set up]

With his Eye Behind the Glass detournement active (on a camera in his Haven watching the feed from Court), Jack would be able to constantly keep an eye on that central spot of Court (who is talking to the Premier, and for how long) and gain some insights on the machinations of Court. [Secondary dice pool]

ritual_casting.casting:
Ritual Name/Level: variation of 'Mantle of the Predator Goddess
Caster/s: Jack, Keeper, Anichka, Cyrus, Charles, Alice, Ivanna, Brandy
Target/s: attendees (Kine and Kindred) of April 17th Rave, We Own the Night 
Duration: 2 nights (effects carry into Court)
Effects and page reference: customised effects (see DT Project 1)
Blush of Life for the night (Alice's contribution),
+4 to Feeding Pool at game start (Keeper's contribution),
Feeding Roll will be Rote as well (Anichka's contribution),
Add their Cruac dots to Presence for court (Charles's contribution),
Everyone gets the Inspired Condition towards showing off the Crones power and presence 
at Court (Brandy's contribution),
Feed with impunity (Ivanna's contribution),
Worshiped as Rave Gods (Cyrus's contribution),
Spreading thought out the Regency (Jack's contribution)
Vitae/Willpower Spent: 1 vitae & 1 willpower to complete Mantle of Amorous Fire portion

Ritual Name/Level: Eye behind the Glass
Caster/s: Jack
Target/s: Jack
Duration: 1 night / vitae spent
Effects and page reference: 1 lethal damage at Court, blind (one eye) tilt in combat, (See Homebrewed Moulding Room Devotion, below)
Vitae/Willpower Spent: 2 vitae (night before court to cast, extra to extend)
THE EYE BEHIND THE GLASS (Auspex •••) Procedure: The cultist gouges out her own eye and glues it with Vitae behind a camera lens. The camera must be capable of recording video. Removing the eye inflicts a point of lethal damage. As long as this mutilation lasts, the vampire suffers the Blind (one eye) Tilt in combat. Removing the eye from the camera will destroy it, as will any exposure to sunlight or fire. Cultists often set their eyes behind a camera recording a bank of feeds. Outcome: The vampire can route the surveillance system directly into her brain. For nights equal to Vitae spent, she can access this camera by taking an instant action to tap into the feed, though she may want to set up a mundane recording device to review footage she doesn’t directly observe. This connection lasts a scene or until she dismisses it, but imposes a –3 on Perception and Defense. This Devotion cost 2 Experience to learn. 

Note: Jack will have cast Eye Behind the Glass at least once during DT to acquire the devotion. Will be recast the night before Court as indicated above.

meta.st_notes:
Jack attends the Social Event (Dinner Party) hosted by Brandy as her plus 1

Jack sets up the venue for Court (will send full description to STs separately)

With Cacophany Savvy 3 (adding this DT), my question to STs would be: "Who is on the Way Out?" to get a sense of scandal to identify another suitable Visitor for the Moulding Room

Project 3: 2xp to gain Devotion, Eye Behind the Glass

NOTE: Please add Auspex 5 (not recorded from DT 1)
Please add Visual Media specialisation for Expression (reconciled leftover point from creation with Simon)

Project Description: 
Jack has been tasked with securing the venue for Court on April 18th. He applies his skills as a director to surveil Court. 
Through his High Society Allies, he negotiates permission from the owner (acquired for $25M in 2024) of a The Hub Theatre (shuttered and closed in 1996) on King Street in Newtown to allow him to put on a small exhibit for a dry run of a private viewing (Court), which he intends to repeat as an extended special exhibit during next DT for high society members (Moulding Room shenanigans). 
[full description of Court setup will be sent to STs] 
The Exhibit consists of projectors with small screens and seats arranged around the art deco ballroom of the theatre profiling visual media over the past century of the Theatre's history -- vaudeville, silent movies, early black and white, colorised film, porn productions in the 70s/80s, and ultimately nothing from ~1996 onwards. The Final Exhibit shows a live feed, top down, of a camera with a LENSBABY Composer 2 Pro Bending Camera Lens mounted on the ceiling that shows the movement of Kindred around the ballroom, blurred focus around the edges by clear focus on the centre -- which is where the central seat for the Premier is located. [Primary dice pool to set up]
With his Eye Behind the Glass detournement active (on a camera in his Haven watching the feed from Court), Jack would be able to constantly keep an eye on that central spot of Court (who is talking to the Premier, and for how long) and gain some insights on the machinations of Court. [Secondary dice pool]

Caster/s: Jack, Keeper, Anichka, Cyrus, Charles, Alice, Ivanna, Brandy

at Court (Brandy's contribution),

Worshiped as Rave Gods (Cyrus's contribution),
Spreading thought out the Regency (Jack's contribution)
Vitae/Willpower Spent: 1 vitae & 1 willpower to complete Mantle of Amorous Fire portion

Ritual Name/Level: Eye behind the Glass
Caster/s: Jack
Target/s: Jack
Duration: 1 night / vitae spent
Effects and page reference: 1 lethal damage at Court, blind (one eye) tilt in combat, (See Homebrewed Moulding Room Devotion, below)
Vitae/Willpower Spent: 2 vitae (night before court to cast, extra to extend)
THE EYE BEHIND THE GLASS (Auspex •••) Procedure: The cultist gouges out her own eye and glues it with Vitae behind a camera lens. The camera must be capable of recording video. Removing the eye inflicts a point of lethal damage. As long as this mutilation lasts, the vampire suffers the Blind (one eye) Tilt in combat. Removing the eye from the camera will destroy it, as will any exposure to sunlight or fire. Cultists often set their eyes behind a camera recording a bank of feeds. Outcome: The vampire can route the surveillance system directly into her brain. For nights equal to Vitae spent, she can access this camera by taking an instant action to tap into the feed, though she may want to set up a mundane recording device to review footage she doesn’t directly observe. This connection lasts a scene or until she dismisses it, but imposes a –3 on Perception and Defense. This Devotion cost 2 Experience to learn. 

Note: Jack will have cast Eye Behind the Glass at least once during DT to acquire the devotion. Will be recast the night before Court as indicated above.

narrative.travel_description:
Keeper always gets around under Face in the Crowd (Obfuscate 1), it's his default state as an Elder and it's only ever really down in Court. How Keeper gets to court:
Her transform into a Swift and flies to/from court - the path is ever changing, high, not a straight line, crossing areas that are impossible to cover on foot/paw/hoof or by vehicle at that speed (~110-170km/h), and has stretches with enough open space to see if anything is following him by air he will use Beast's Hackles (Auspex 1) to check for people following using Twilight Projection (Auspex 5). This is his preferred method of travel as he honestly enjoys it.
narrative.game_recount:
- Punished Cyrus but aging him 50 years for hiding in shame from the Crone hunt.
- Taunted the Enforcer, she is very out of her depth
- Backed Jack as Regent of The Academy
- I like Anichka, but she is hopeless when it comes to anything more complex than passing on visions and caring like a doting mother. She'll be an interesting Hierophant.
- Yusuf finally arrived, so I can now watch the drama play out between him and Brandy
- I think I called the Premier my childe a few times... awkward.
narrative.standout_rp: Ludica + Conrad
narrative.ic_correspondence:
My dearest love,

In these nights of long contemplation, I find myself stirred by an unexpected bloom of promise. A young one has crossed my path once more, all fire, piss, and vinegar. Yet beneath that blustering veneer I sense the makings of a worthy adversary in the centuries to come.

It is a strange delight, like discovering a seedling pushing bravely through winter frost, knowing that with careful tending, patient shaping, and the gentle pressure of my guiding hand, they may one night rise to challenge even me.

The thought warms this ancient heart more than I care to admit, and I wished, as always, to share that warmth with you first.

Also, I have connected with my grandchilde, he is an embarrassment that will be remedied.

Your love immortal,

Henry
narrative.most_trusted_pc:
Charlie Ballsack to do his duty.
Ivana to endanger him.
Anicka to be who she is.
Rene to work against him.
narrative.actively_harming_pc: Annoy the Carthians in general, but not in so much effort than is serendipitous and convenient.

Proliferate Blood-Ties 
Collect Memories 
Become desired in society again

feeding.method:
On top of his Cult, Keeper feeds from all walks of life in all sorts of places. He has a taste for those he senses may be carrying trauma and takes memories as well as blood. He cloaks himself in the Mantle of the Predator Goddess (Cruac 4 - SotC pg186) and studies people while under Face in the Crowd (Obfuscate 1), gliding through the city like the predator he is until he finds someone lucky enough to align with his current predilection, then uses Mesmerize (Dominate 1) on them to make them compliant before feeding and removing the memory of the encounter from them like he was never even there. The process of finding someone isn't quick and he doesn't hurry it, he has eternity, he spends more time feeding than most. If he does find someone particularly interesting, he may later work to absorbed them into his cult.

Base [Intelligence 3 + Empathy 4 (Spec: Sin-Eater) + Dominate (4)] + 4 Mantle of the Predator Goddess (Cruac 4) = 15 Dice

projects.desired_outcome: Spend time with Rene Meyer getting to know them better.
projects.description:
Project Name: Night of the Long Spoons
Characters involved: Rene Meyer
Merits & Bonuses: Mantle of Predator Goddess
XP Spend: n/a
Tonight, the devils of the city dine together. I have been invited by Rene Meyer to feed in the second City, we will hunt via her methods first, and then mine. I am excited to spend more time with her, with the right mentoring, growth and support she will be a stunning nemesis in a few short decades, then I can truly have some fun! She'll appreciate it when she's older.

I will take her to nursing homes, getting in with Dominate and Obfuscate. Then we will find the loneliest people, rouse them from slumber and hear their stories. We will take only 1 Vitae per kine, they are old after all, then I will use Dominate to wipe our visit from their minds but leave them with wonderful memories of being visited by a long-lost lover or friend with an understanding that it was likely the last time they can visit. I will ask Rene to let me taste her blood and if she allows it (which she does) I will form a Blood-Tie with her (she did not expect that) and share the memories of those we drink from, so she may fully understand this is not just about blood, this is about shared experience, memory. These people will die in time, but their lives shall live on; it is a gift. The memories of the Kine I share will not be permanent for Rene as she does not have the training required to house so much and I do not want her broken, but the sensations and the understanding will linger.

Afterwards, we'll go to Riverside Theaters, and watch a local indigenous circus performance. Perhaps an indulgence. I know Rene loves the arts, and I wish to see more of the culture that is the memory of this land.

projects.desired_outcome: Lead the casting of the Crone Rave Ritual
projects.description:
Project Name: We Own the Night
Characters involved: Jack, Cyrus, Anichka, Keeper, Brandy, Alice, Charles, Ivana
Merits & Bonuses: Cruac 4, Face in the Crowd (Obfuscate 1), The Tase of Things Lived.
XP Spend: n/a
Project description:

Keeper will attend the rave and draw on The Taste of Things Lived (Bloodline Devotion) for a +5 Bonus to Occult allowing him to work with the others to combine the old ways of Cruac with Cyrus and Jacks more 'modern' ritual. He will make sure none of his cult attend and remain under Face in the Crowd for the duration of the evening. Only occasionally interacting with the other members. For the majority of the night, he will move through the crowd looking for those that do not belong or causing disruption and Mesmerise them to leave. Only once he has culled and cultivated the crowd and the ritual is in full unstoppable swing will he truly partake in the bacchanal. His way of doing so is to find a high perch above the crowd and fully connect through the blood-ties he has with every Crone in attendance, letting the vicarious waves of abandon flow through him - linking them like an emotional nexus point. If he feels any of them start to crest into Frenzy, he will cast "Mantle of the Beast’s Breath" (Cruac 2) on them to make sure they can Ride the Wave of Frenzy, still in the throes of the ritual, but not a danger to themselves, the crowd, or the Masquerade. 

Ritual Casting a variation of 'Mantle of the Predator Goddess'. 
Acolytes dance themselves into a trance during the entire casting of this ritual and adopt the Blush of Life. They each must spend a point of Willpower to rise from the exhaustion. Once cast, the Acolytes will gain the following benefits for the night:

Blush of Life for the night (Alice's contribution)
+4 to Feeding Pool at game start (Keeper's contribution)
Feeding Roll will be Rote as well (Anichka's contribution)
Add their Cruac dots to Presence for court (Charles's contribution)
Gain the Inspired Condition towards showing off the Crones power and presence at Court (Brandy's contribution)
Feed with impunity at the rave (Ivanna's contribution)
Worshiped as Rave Gods during the rave (Cyrus's contribution)
Attendees gain Seed of Her Divinity relating to the evening (Jack's contribution)
The vibe of this party permeates The Academy this month.

responses.project_3_description:
Characters involved: Jack, Cyrus, Anichka, Keeper, Brandy, Alice, Charles, Ivana
Merits & Bonuses: Cruac 4, Face in the Crowd (Obfuscate 1), The Tase of Things Lived.
Project description:
Keeper will attend the rave and draw on The Taste of Things Lived (Bloodline Devotion) for a +5 Bonus to Occult allowing him to work with the others to combine the old ways of Cruac with Cyrus and Jacks more 'modern' ritual. He will make sure none of his cult attend and remain under Face in the Crowd for the duration of the evening. Only occasionally interacting with the other members. For the majority of the night, he will move through the crowd looking for those that do not belong or causing disruption and Mesmerise them to leave. Only once he has culled and cultivated the crowd and the ritual is in full unstoppable swing will he truly partake in the bacchanal. His way of doing so is to find a high perch above the crowd and fully connect through the blood-ties he has with every Crone in attendance, letting the vicarious waves of abandon flow through him - linking them like an emotional nexus point. If he feels any of them start to crest into Frenzy, he will cast "Mantle of the Beast’s Breath" (Cruac 2) on them to make sure they can Ride the Wave of Frenzy, still in the throes of the ritual, but not a danger to themselves, the crowd, or the Masquerade. 
Ritual Casting a variation of 'Mantle of the Predator Goddess'. 
Acolytes dance themselves into a trance during the entire casting of this ritual and adopt the Blush of Life. They each must spend a point of Willpower to rise from the exhaustion. Once cast, the Acolytes will gain the following benefits for the night:
Blush of Life for the night (Alice's contribution)
+4 to Feeding Pool at game start (Keeper's contribution)
Feeding Roll will be Rote as well (Anichka's contribution)
Add their Cruac dots to Presence for court (Charles's contribution)
Gain the Inspired Condition towards showing off the Crones power and presence at Court (Brandy's contribution)
Feed with impunity at the rave (Ivanna's contribution)
Worshiped as Rave Gods during the rave (Cyrus's contribution)
Attendees gain Seed of Her Divinity relating to the evening (Jack's contribution)
The vibe of this party permeates The Academy this month.
responses.project_3_pool_expr: Manipulation 2 + Occult 5 + Cruac 4 + 5 (The Taste of Things Lived Bonus) = 16 Dice (9-Again)

I'll scour the stole time to see if they have encounter anything or one of interest.

narrative.travel_description:
"I have taken to travel hooded desgins, and taken allyways in the inner city to get the courts as unoticed as possible when living in the dockyards, the rats infestation along the way is displeasure to see. 

Atlas, speaking to Reed, he has allowed me stay here as long I work within the invictus means, which gladly i accepted that position, I have moved my location to the habour, to contuine my work here and as a place to feed upon the cattle that live among us at night, definitely a better site to see with hardly any rats around, which will allow me to productively work on projects wirhout rats going around, they maybe cute, but that level of infestation disgust me. While residenting at the habour, and going the courts I acompany myself with Reed to the courts"
narrative.game_recount:
Recount 1: "I have been reckonized by Primer Eve. She has given status, which is an honor to me indeed"

Recount 2: "Eve has introduced me to a researcher named Cuzz, once the introduction was concluded, we spoke about the strange occurrence and agreed to work together after courts and find out whats really going on".

Recount 3: "I have used my influence and voted for Reed to take the shores, which was later changed to the habour and am pleased my effect were not in vain, invictus has claimed territory in the habour"
narrative.standout_rp: Cuzz and Reed
narrative.ic_correspondence:
Dear Journal,

"what happened at courts that new member of ours, I feel absolutely embarrassed, can not recall his name, am information broker I should work on knowing other kindlerd names. My emotions are getting the better of me probably why dont recall his name, dressed in an orange suit, abit of sore eye on how he dressed. Regardless, I sincerely hope he has better control of his vampire nature's, I can relate when I was young kindlerd myself, the lack of control is definitely something to overcome, especially when feeding we must always be aware of vampric natures and keeping them in check"

narrative.travel_description: Maggie and Mac make a point of visibly catching public transport to and from Court. Trains and buses, for this court. The before and after is where the field-craft comes in; they double back, go down blind alleys and cut through abandoned lots. If they need to, they call in minor favours for a Carthian Limo (aka a plain white van with enough bodies in it to make sneaking in with Obfuscate too difficult to be worthwhile).
narrative.game_recount:
-Eve (Premier) communicated to Mac and Maggie that in effect she was recording every conversation at court; she didn’t intend to share the tapes but be aware that they could potentially be accessed. 

-Mac and Maggie pushed for René Meyer to be the first of the rotating Regents for Carthian territory (in this case the Second City). Maggie seconded her and she was unopposed. Mac seconded Yusuf. 

-Meeting (Mac detected a presence, decided not to share that he had as a counter-espionage strategy)
- [ ] Limited kindred power (Blood Potency)
- [ ] Temporarily 
- [ ] Broadly positive response 
- [ ] No objections 
- [ ] Part of the Carthian experiment 
- [ ] Find out - is it the system that corrupts? The blood? Something else?
- [ ] We can’t stop kindred from ageing 
- [ ] But we can work it out in various ways
- [ ] Aura, Auspex etc
- [ ] They might just perish from Sydney’s weirdness 
- [ ] But that could hit everyone 
- [ ] Not to be announced tonight 
- [ ] Premier: if it is the system that corrupts, you all will have to decide the experiment has ended
- [ ] Everyone laughed and confirms they’d wreck her if needed
- [ ] Premier started to explain about the microphones she had set up but Mac interrupted before she could mention it, claiming that they were out of time and needed to go downstairs 

-Conrad read Mac’s mind, got some information and planted confrontational emotions. Mac doesn’t know exactly what happened, but he worked out later that someone fucked with him. He started pinging every Mekhet he could for involvement in the astral spying; no conclusive answers yet. 

-Influence was influenced. Carthians got the Second City but nothing else. Deterrence will be the name of the game given the disparity in influence.
narrative.standout_rp: Peter (Yusuf) did a great job of introducing himself to the game.
narrative.ic_correspondence:
P,

J.
Premier let slip she's been recording everything—says she won't use them, but they're there. Someone was ghostingin during the meeting. Didn't mention it. Conrad's been asking things he shouldn't know. Someone was in my head. Nobody's talking. We got the floor. Rest is theirs. Defence it is.

—M
narrative.most_trusted_pc:
Doc Maggie, and it’s not close. 

After her it’s probably René Meyer, but that might be less trust than just knowing what to expect.
narrative.actively_harming_pc: Conrad Sondergard - he’s English, a former cop, politically aligned against the Movement and he was holding Kirk Grimm’s leash. He’s also a potential link between the Circle and Lance because of his heritage; Mac wants to make sure any such link is severed.
narrative.aspirations:
Short-Term Aspiration: Build networks of information to identify, categorise and plan the destruction of assets associated with (actual or potential) foes. 

Medium-Term Aspiration: Build the local Carthians into something that actually works together—trust, coordination, the kind of solidarity where one phone call brings knives out of the dark. The kind of organisation that can deter anyone from fucking with it. 

Long-Term Aspiration: A city without Praxis. No thrones, no princes, no Invictus landlords collecting rent on other people's nights. Just kindred who govern themselves because they have to, not because some elder tells them to.

feeding.method:
Primary Feeding Pool: Wits + Stealth + Auspex

Blood Type: Cold/Animal

Feeding Style: Mac can’t feed by seduction or trickery like most Vampires; the Norvegi curse is a genuine problem. He’ll be looking for abattoirs and hospitals where he can clean up spilled blood in large quantities, or sometimes pounds where animals are due to be put down and no-one will be too interested if they die suddenly the night before. He’s careful, patient and practical about feeding; he avoids running on empty if he can so he’s never feeding out of desperation (but of course best laid plans, etc).

projects.desired_outcome: Scout the Academy by patrolling it.
projects.description:
Project Name: The Letter of the Agreement
Characters involved: Mac
Merits & Bonuses: n/a
XP Spend: n/a
Project description: The agreement with Jack is feeding rights in exchange for patrolling; I’m absolutely patrolling and looking for poachers, but I’m looking hard at the whole territory. Who’s active, who’s trying not to look active, who’s got power and influence. I make a point of being visible; the ‘patrol’ is meant to be as much about deterrence as observation, and being open about my presence should make the underlying observation less suspicious.

projects.description:
Project Name: Preparing (for) the urban battlefield
Characters involved: Mac
Merits & Bonuses: Professional Training 5 (Urban Guerrilla)
XP Spend: N/A
Project description: Mac make sure he knows where he’s going and what he’s doing. He finds the little side alleys and bolt holes; he looks for roof access, ingress and egress points. He spars with other Carthians, works out spots where the broken streetlights are perfect for an ambush. He sets up blinds in back alleys and checks with manhole covers are the easiest to shift. When the fighting starts, the urban guerrilla has already made ready the battlefield.

Project Name: Following the Thread
Characters involved: Mac
Merits & Bonuses: N/A
XP Spend: N/A
Project description: Last downtime, Mac’s Underworld Contacts revealed a “new player has been moving through it in the past month, methodical and well-resourced, consolidating across multiple criminal sectors in a way that suggests serious backing”. Mac suspects Kindred involvement, so he’s looking into this mysterious figure himself, chasing down leads and trying to find a kindred link.

projects.description:
Project Name: Spinning Webs
Characters involved: Mac
Merits & Bonuses: Obfuscate 1 - be unnoticed and unobtrusive 
XP Spend: 4 - +1 Contacts (Police) [1], +1 Allies (Street) [1], acquire Picket Line [2]
Project description: It’s clear that the Movement is falling behind in the information war, and Max can’t tolerate that. He feeds some low-level idiot criminals to the police to build up a rapport, and he makes sure to target the ones who make it hard for his Street Allies to stretch their wings. He’s putting together links and connections that can be forewarning…and forearming.

meta.st_notes:
Mac and Maggie attend Brandy La Roux’s dinner party. Mac takes the opportunity to Auspex-check any Mekhet who attend to see if they’re linked to the spectral presence he detected at Court. 

They also attend the rave Jack invites them to. Once again, Mac is trying to Tomas’s out whatever he can about Kindred priorities and goals, and he’ll take the opportunity to investigate with Auspex if it comes up. 

Otherwise most of his unoccupied time is spent on OpSec - checking for surveillance, setting up dead-drops, organising the Great Carthian Unwashed into cells…you know, normal stuff.
meta.xp_spend:
XP Claimed: Game Attendance 1, Costuming/Immersion 1, Downtime 1

Total XP Spent:
Project 4: 4xp [add Contacts 4 (Police) - 1xp, increase Allies (Street) to 2 - 1xp, acquire Picket Line Merit - 2xp]

responses.travel: Maggie and Mac make a point of visibly catching public transport to and from Court. Trains and buses, for this court. The before and after is where the field-craft comes in; they double back, go down blind alleys and cut through abandoned lots. If they need to, they call in minor favours for a Carthian Limo (aka a plain white van with enough bodies in it to make sneaking in with Obfuscate too difficult to be worthwhile).
responses.game_recount:
-Eve (Premier) communicated to Mac and Maggie that in effect she was recording every conversation at court; she didn’t intend to share the tapes but be aware that they could potentially be accessed. 

-Mac and Maggie pushed for René Meyer to be the first of the rotating Regents for Carthian territory (in this case the Second City). Maggie seconded her and she was unopposed. Mac seconded Yusuf. 

-Meeting (Mac detected a presence, decided not to share that he had as a counter-espionage strategy)
- [ ] Limited kindred power (Blood Potency)
- [ ] Temporarily 
- [ ] Broadly positive response 
- [ ] No objections 
- [ ] Part of the Carthian experiment 
- [ ] Find out - is it the system that corrupts? The blood? Something else?
- [ ] We can’t stop kindred from ageing 
- [ ] But we can work it out in various ways
- [ ] Aura, Auspex etc
- [ ] They might just perish from Sydney’s weirdness 
- [ ] But that could hit everyone 
- [ ] Not to be announced tonight 
- [ ] Premier: if it is the system that corrupts, you all will have to decide the experiment has ended
- [ ] Everyone laughed and confirms they’d wreck her if needed
- [ ] Premier started to explain about the microphones she had set up but Mac interrupted before she could mention it, claiming that they were out of time and needed to go downstairs 

-Conrad read Mac’s mind, got some information and planted confrontational emotions. Mac doesn’t know exactly what happened, but he worked out later that someone fucked with him. He started pinging every Mekhet he could for involvement in the astral spying; no conclusive answers yet. 

-Influence was influenced. Carthians got the Second City but nothing else. Deterrence will be the name of the game given the disparity in influence.
responses.correspondence:
P,

J.
Premier let slip she's been recording everything—says she won't use them, but they're there. Someone was ghostingin during the meeting. Didn't mention it. Conrad's been asking things he shouldn't know. Someone was in my head. Nobody's talking. We got the floor. Rest is theirs. Defence it is.

—M
responses.trust:
Doc Maggie, and it’s not close. 

After her it’s probably René Meyer, but that might be less trust than just knowing what to expect.
responses.harm: Conrad Sondergard - he’s English, a former cop, politically aligned against the Movement and he was holding Kirk Grimm’s leash. He’s also a potential link between the Circle and Lance because of his heritage; Mac wants to make sure any such link is severed.
responses.aspirations:
Short-Term Aspiration: Build networks of information to identify, categorise and plan the destruction of assets associated with (actual or potential) foes. 

Medium-Term Aspiration: Build the local Carthians into something that actually works together—trust, coordination, the kind of solidarity where one phone call brings knives out of the dark. The kind of organisation that can deter anyone from fucking with it. 

Long-Term Aspiration: A city without Praxis. No thrones, no princes, no Invictus landlords collecting rent on other people's nights. Just kindred who govern themselves because they have to, not because some elder tells them to.
responses.rp_shoutout: ["Peter (Yusuf) did a great job of introducing himself to the game."]
responses.project_1_outcome: Scout the Academy by patrolling it.
responses.project_1_description:
Characters involved: Mac
Merits & Bonuses: n/a
Project description: The agreement with Jack is feeding rights in exchange for patrolling; I’m absolutely patrolling and looking for poachers, but I’m looking hard at the whole territory. Who’s active, who’s trying not to look active, who’s got power and influence. I make a point of being visible; the ‘patrol’ is meant to be as much about deterrence as observation, and being open about my presence should make the underlying observation less suspicious.
responses.project_2_outcome: Maintain Professional Training
responses.project_2_description:
Characters involved: Mac
Merits & Bonuses: Professional Training 5 (Urban Guerrilla)
Project description: Mac make sure he knows where he’s going and what he’s doing. He finds the little side alleys and bolt holes; he looks for roof access, ingress and egress points. He spars with other Carthians, works out spots where the broken streetlights are perfect for an ambush. He sets up blinds in back alleys and checks with manhole covers are the easiest to shift. When the fighting starts, the urban guerrilla has already made ready the battlefield.

narrative.travel_description: Driving and then on foot, avoiding places with high foot traffic and surveillance as much as possible while looking casual
narrative.game_recount:
Organised both an Invictus meeting and a Ventrue meeting.
Ventrue seem generally obsessed with their covenant dealings and only minimally interested in clan activities.
put hand up for a Regency that nobody went for, same time as two others. Beat them in the vote soundly
Feel that most people are well out of their depth and flailing to find the right way to do anything
narrative.standout_rp: Rene Meyer (Luca V)
narrative.ic_correspondence:
To my darling Sire, 

I have embedded myself well within Sydney, I do not expect to suffer serious resistance while here and expect to be able to achieve my goals easily. As discussed I will be moving my fealty to our covenant head here in Sydney, Rene St Dominique, but this in not way lessens my respect for your power and authority, I am still at your beck and call to fulfill your desires within the Invictus.

There seems to be many here even newer to the sect than I am, several of which seek to serve me though I am not sure if they are worthy of the position. If they do, I will make use of them and they will either prove to be Invictus or fall by the wayside.
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Rene St Dominique
narrative.actively_harming_pc: Nobody Specifically, but seeking mostly to subtly foil Carthian plans

regency.regency_action: Reed puts his time as Regent into improving the nightlife of the Harbour. He is investing time and resources into events and popups to attract people and makes it known that punishments will be severe for kindred who break the rules or get out of control. He is trying to create an atmosphere that will draw in the rich and famous and make the common people wish they could be in the vip to rub shoulders when all they can manage is to be in the same party

narrative.travel_description:
Taking some time to mill around as the court ends, Rene heads to a late-night club after court, a place still busy even in the early hours of the dark morning. 

After spending a bit of time milling with mortals, arguing with one about the benefits of universal income, she uses obfuscate and slips out with a group of tipsy mortals- breaking from them a few blocks from the club and making her way back to the Harbor and her haven.
narrative.game_recount:
- Recorded the names of most all attendees at court before arrival
- Spoke with the Premier and a few Carthian fellows about the fact this court was not an appropriate place to speak even privately about 'sensitive and secret information' that they didn't want getting outed.
- After the Premier speaks about the nature of territory, I was approached by Doc and volunteered for regency over the Second City, on the provision that I was to stand down when needed.
- Found out very little of what I was endeavoring to discover.
- Spoke with a crone Alice Vunder about co-operating more closely, informing them of some of the less savory sorts.
- Had a meeting with the Carthians about the goal of this experiment: The suppression of Blood Potency whilst within the city, nothing higher than 2.
- Got regency over the Second city- not the ideal spot, I'd rather the Docks, but it's better than nothing.
- Invited Keeper to feed with me- one of the many 'problem' Kindred, best to know a little more about them. Enemies close, and all that.
narrative.standout_rp: The new fellow in the red suit is amazing, especially for their first game. Also Yusuf Kronkshuc (Peter) for impecible Nos roleplay and costuming- Above and beyond, the only Nos I know at a glance.
narrative.ic_correspondence:
Solidarity

I've sent a list of names accompanying this missive, these are the Kindred important enough to attend court in Sydney. Territory is being divided, my fellow Carthians placing me in power over one of them for the moment- 'The Second city'. The cycle of Kindred dominance is spinning up. The silver lining at least, is that our fledgling Premier seemingly wants to do something all-together unique with the city. Obviously this is extremely confidential, but I'm an Anti-Obstructionist first, and a Carthian second. 

Her plan: To institute a rule- though both Carthian Law and practical enforcement, to preclude all but the least blood-potent kindred entrance into the city. 

On one hand, this would bar those with extreme powers of the blood and the appetites that accompany them. On the other, it does encourage kindred to lean more heavily on their more mortal-facing powers. Then again, less potency means less blood to influence mortals with. I'm undecided about this, but probably have more pertinent issues to navigate.

I've set up some roots in addition to the new territory, a public radio station and some informants in mortal affairs- though I worry many of the institutions of the city have been taken solidly by kindred, especially in the finance sector. I've also spoken more with the Crone member known as 'Alice Vunder'. They have a rather Anti-Obstructionist viewpoint. We've reached an understanding, and perhaps with a bit of a push, I can make a radical out of her. Then again, you never know with witches. 

I am, as ever, surrounded by cut-throat predators. I feel somewhat like a seagull in a hurricane.

Cest la vie. Mieux vaut être chanceux que bon.

~R
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Doc- Though she finds the way she talks down to her erksome, Alice Vunder to an extent, considering they have a similar outlook
narrative.actively_harming_pc:
Reed Justice- to remove their grasp on mortal affairs
Rene St. Dominique- Also involved in mortal control, and has her name. Bastard.
Conrad Sondergaard- the policeman being a longtime enemy
Keeper- Whom she knows has a hold on minds, but not to how much extent
narrative.aspirations:
Short- Consolidate the territory Rene has found herself in control of on behalf of the Carthian movement, continue find out who owns what pieces on the board. 

Medium- Investigate the motivations of the Premier, and appraise their plan to limit the city's blood potency. Keep touchstones safe.

Long- Identify the biggest threat against the AOA and destroy it.

regency.regency_action:
New tags and obscure graffiti is appearing throughout the Second City. Heralding a message to the unwashed masses that creeps through hearsay, trickles down the web of streets, or subtly confronts those who'd refuse to hear in dead-end alleys. 

"This territoire frontière, isolated to flourish into something nonpareil, has until now been free from the tampering of immortal plots.

It calls to the spirit of the Carthian Movement, and that spirit sleeps in the Second City. As such I speak not as a Regent, but a Steward of this territory. Tending to it whilst we all advance the cause, until I can pass it to the next Steward who will do the same.

After all, there are plenty of other cities to sink into the hedonistic apathy of our nature. Here, your hands help build something new- or they get broken.

If you can commit to that, I welcome all- even those not of the Movement have a place here.

Likewise, to any other supernatural entities, I extend a hand of greeting and welcome. The Carthian Movement is an eclectic beast- and has space to negotiate and learn from our neighbors in the night.

Mortals however are another story. The preservation of the Masquerade is the preservation of the City. I will be ruthless in its enforcement, and expect likewise from all of you. 

We have a chance to build something brilliant here. We shall do so together, or pejorate alone."

projects.action_type_raw: Feed: Dedicate extra time to feeding🩸
projects.desired_outcome: To understand Keeper better via feeding with him
projects.description:
Project Name: Night of the Long Spoons

Characters involved: Rene, Keeper

Merits & Bonuses: Quicken Sight (Would it work with hearing?)

Project description: Tonight, the devils of the city dine together. I have invited Keeper to feed in the second City, we will hunt via my methods first, and then his. A risk, for this dangerous and eccentric kindred is my enemy- but I need to know more about his nature, and this is a good opportunity to do so even if I do expose myself in kind.

We will roam the night crowds of Parramatta- the art scenes and music bars, picking out those despondent and using them to feed. Then, we will feed with Keepers methods, whatever they turn out to be, and I will observe and partake.

Given his unique interest in the minds of mortals and kindred, I hope to deduce if his outlook is an improvement over the traditional attitude towards kindred control over mortals- or is it even worse? Regardless, I hope to get to know him a little better- given that I'm planning his downfall. 

Afterwards, we'll go to Riverside Theaters, and watch a performance. Perhaps an indulgence, but there's probably some utility to it.

As a final precaution given I suspect his powers over the mind, I will hide my digital recorder on me throughout the night. At its conclusion, I will listen though it sped up using my powers of Celerity to make sure I recall things... correctly.

projects.desired_outcome: Gain Cacophany Savvy 3 via roaming throughout the City
projects.description:
Project Name: Tuning in to Cityscapes

Characters involved: Rene

Merits & Bonuses: Cacophony Savvy

XP Spend: 1

Project description: The Kindred of the City are beginning to coagulate, consolidating territory and starting their long term immortal plans. As they look outward toward the future, the 'what was' of the city starts slowly falling though the cracks- I hope to catch a glimpse of the forest before we start cutting the trees. With that, I can know how it will grow with its new arrivals.

From the Opera House and the City Centre, further on to Rookwood and the River- never lingering and with no concern to territory or development I will roam. The Cacophony echos, and with a little bit of luck, I'll finally find its harmony.

Project Name: First watch in the Second City

Characters involved: Rene

Merits & Bonuses: Cacophony Savvy

XP Spend: 0

Project description: Though the will of my fellow Carthians, I'm now responsible for a territory. Only logical that I observe it closer. Unlike my other wanderings through the broader city in order to understand it spirit, this is a purely practical matter- foremost to protect from poachers (Observing them, inviting them to feed if Carthian and confronting them if not.), but secondly to get to know the territory a little better. 

An eye from above will be useful when I likely need to pass the territory off to others... Walking under obfuscate in areas Kindred like to hunt, making sure the filthy masses and those above are behaving- and if I encounter any deviousness, I always have my Auspex.

projects.description:
Project Name: Bearing Arms

Characters involved: Rene, Eve (Via a representative/ally of hers)

XP Spend: 3

Project description: 

Tonight I meet with one of the Premier's folk at Rodd Park to receive a delivery- a heavy container of very clandestine gifts. A Light revolver, Rifle, Suppressor, and most importantly: A Crossbow. This furtive meeting shan't last any longer than it need, after which I will slip back to my haven in one of the many small dinghies that populate the shoreline

I was never a strong woman in life, and even now can't heft this shiny new Crossbow with any real competency. Usually that'd mean a lot of strength training, but Kindred, as always, can cheat.

Practicing with in the hold of our boat-haven for the next few nights, I hope to rouse the blood and ignite the supernatural strength that I know is in my power. Loading and firing the thing, the focus will not be in improving my accuracy but trying to substitute my lack of mundane strength with the powers of the Blood.

Hopefully Einar will not mind too much. He's been taking flight often enough that I should have the place to myself for a while.

sphere_actions.description: 185.3, Your voice at Midnight: Welcome once more, friends, to Red Night Radio. A quarter moon, and these kinds of nights just have a different air. That's what I want to ask you about, dear audience: Whether you're an early riser or a late-shift worker, I'm sure you've seen a strange thing or two in the other-world of the small hours. Call in, and tell me your best tale on 1800-RED-NOX and I'll spin the best for our fellow listeners here. The more recent the better, and don't skimp on the details!

Request: To find out who is distributing/forging these fake police badges and for what purpose- if any. Someone with such a talent could prove useful.

meta.st_notes:
A few things!

1. Einar (Nathan Hodge) and I have determined that our haven is going to be in on Marina, 5 Cary St, Drummoyne. A regular looking Yacht with a sun-proofed hold and lead boxes for sleeping- currently docked on Bay A 17. 

2. Before court, as a non-downtime thing, Rene is going to be attending Jack's (George Tomossy's) Rave before court at the Academy. She's mainly attending to keep an eye on things, making an effort to put on a gentle face whilst remaining quite suspicious.

3. Thus far I've found the social/door system quite unused, it's perhaps because people don't know to use it but bringing things out to track doors and interrupting play for social actions does seem a bit cumbersome considering all the other stuff we've got going on- at least, in my brief experience. As such, I'd like to change my sheet to remove the two merits that relate to the social system- Table Turner and Fast Talk, and place those two XP dots into 'Feeding Grounds 2' if possible. I can always re-buy them if/when the social system becomes more relevant. 

4. You guys are doing great- the effort I can see you all putting into this project is immense and I'm really very impressed. Thanks again <3

responses.travel:
Taking some time to mill around as the court ends, Rene heads to a late-night club after court, a place still busy even in the early hours of the dark morning. 

After spending a bit of time milling with mortals, arguing with one about the benefits of universal income, she uses obfuscate and slips out with a group of tipsy mortals- breaking from them a few blocks from the club and making her way back to the Harbor and her haven.
responses.game_recount:
- Recorded the names of most all attendees at court before arrival
- Spoke with the Premier and a few Carthian fellows about the fact this court was not an appropriate place to speak even privately about 'sensitive and secret information' that they didn't want getting outed.
- After the Premier speaks about the nature of territory, I was approached by Doc and volunteered for regency over the Second City, on the provision that I was to stand down when needed.
- Found out very little of what I was endeavoring to discover.
- Spoke with a crone Alice Vunder about co-operating more closely, informing them of some of the less savory sorts.
- Had a meeting with the Carthians about the goal of this experiment: The suppression of Blood Potency whilst within the city, nothing higher than 2.
- Got regency over the Second city- not the ideal spot, I'd rather the Docks, but it's better than nothing.
- Invited Keeper to feed with me- one of the many 'problem' Kindred, best to know a little more about them. Enemies close, and all that.
responses.correspondence:
Solidarity

I've sent a list of names accompanying this missive, these are the Kindred important enough to attend court in Sydney. Territory is being divided, my fellow Carthians placing me in power over one of them for the moment- 'The Second city'. The cycle of Kindred dominance is spinning up. The silver lining at least, is that our fledgling Premier seemingly wants to do something all-together unique with the city. Obviously this is extremely confidential, but I'm an Anti-Obstructionist first, and a Carthian second. 

Her plan: To institute a rule- though both Carthian Law and practical enforcement, to preclude all but the least blood-potent kindred entrance into the city. 

On one hand, this would bar those with extreme powers of the blood and the appetites that accompany them. On the other, it does encourage kindred to lean more heavily on their more mortal-facing powers. Then again, less potency means less blood to influence mortals with. I'm undecided about this, but probably have more pertinent issues to navigate.

I've set up some roots in addition to the new territory, a public radio station and some informants in mortal affairs- though I worry many of the institutions of the city have been taken solidly by kindred, especially in the finance sector. I've also spoken more with the Crone member known as 'Alice Vunder'. They have a rather Anti-Obstructionist viewpoint. We've reached an understanding, and perhaps with a bit of a push, I can make a radical out of her. Then again, you never know with witches. 

I am, as ever, surrounded by cut-throat predators. I feel somewhat like a seagull in a hurricane.

Cest la vie. Mieux vaut être chanceux que bon.

~R
responses.trust: Doc- Though she finds the way she talks down to her erksome, Alice Vunder to an extent, considering they have a similar outlook
responses.harm:
Reed Justice- to remove their grasp on mortal affairs
Rene St. Dominique- Also involved in mortal control, and has her name. Bastard.
Conrad Sondergaard- the policeman being a longtime enemy
Keeper- Whom she knows has a hold on minds, but not to how much extent
responses.aspirations:
Short- Consolidate the territory Rene has found herself in control of on behalf of the Carthian movement, continue find out who owns what pieces on the board. 

Medium- Investigate the motivations of the Premier, and appraise their plan to limit the city's blood potency. Keep touchstones safe.

Long- Identify the biggest threat against the AOA and destroy it.
responses.rp_shoutout: ["The new fellow in the red suit is amazing","especially for their first game. Also Yusuf Kronkshuc (Peter) for impecible Nos roleplay and costuming- Above and beyond","the only Nos I know at a glance."]
responses.regency_action:
New tags and obscure graffiti is appearing throughout the Second City. Heralding a message to the unwashed masses that creeps through hearsay, trickles down the web of streets, or subtly confronts those who'd refuse to hear in dead-end alleys. 

"This territoire frontière, isolated to flourish into something nonpareil, has until now been free from the tampering of immortal plots.

It calls to the spirit of the Carthian Movement, and that spirit sleeps in the Second City. As such I speak not as a Regent, but a Steward of this territory. Tending to it whilst we all advance the cause, until I can pass it to the next Steward who will do the same.

After all, there are plenty of other cities to sink into the hedonistic apathy of our nature. Here, your hands help build something new- or they get broken.

If you can commit to that, I welcome all- even those not of the Movement have a place here.

Likewise, to any other supernatural entities, I extend a hand of greeting and welcome. The Carthian Movement is an eclectic beast- and has space to negotiate and learn from our neighbors in the night.

Mortals however are another story. The preservation of the Masquerade is the preservation of the City. I will be ruthless in its enforcement, and expect likewise from all of you. 

We have a chance to build something brilliant here. We shall do so together, or pejorate alone."
responses.project_1_outcome: To understand Keeper better via feeding with him
responses.project_1_description:
Characters involved: Rene, Keeper
Merits & Bonuses: Quicken Sight (Would it work with hearing?)
Project description: Tonight, the devils of the city dine together. I have invited Keeper to feed in the second City, we will hunt via my methods first, and then his. A risk, for this dangerous and eccentric kindred is my enemy- but I need to know more about his nature, and this is a good opportunity to do so even if I do expose myself in kind.
We will roam the night crowds of Parramatta- the art scenes and music bars, picking out those despondent and using them to feed. Then, we will feed with Keepers methods, whatever they turn out to be, and I will observe and partake.
Given his unique interest in the minds of mortals and kindred, I hope to deduce if his outlook is an improvement over the traditional attitude towards kindred control over mortals- or is it even worse? Regardless, I hope to get to know him a little better- given that I'm planning his downfall. 
Afterwards, we'll go to Riverside Theaters, and watch a performance. Perhaps an indulgence, but there's probably some utility to it.
As a final precaution given I suspect his powers over the mind, I will hide my digital recorder on me throughout the night. At its conclusion, I will listen though it sped up using my powers of Celerity to make sure I recall things... correctly.
responses.project_2_outcome: Gain Cacophany Savvy 3 via roaming throughout the City
responses.project_2_description:
Characters involved: Rene
Merits & Bonuses: Cacophony Savvy
Project description: The Kindred of the City are beginning to coagulate, consolidating territory and starting their long term immortal plans. As they look outward toward the future, the 'what was' of the city starts slowly falling though the cracks- I hope to catch a glimpse of the forest before we start cutting the trees. With that, I can know how it will grow with its new arrivals.
From the Opera House and the City Centre, further on to Rookwood and the River- never lingering and with no concern to territory or development I will roam. The Cacophony echos, and with a little bit of luck, I'll finally find its harmony.

narrative.travel_description: I drive myself. I park in a public parking bay in the city and use the back-alleys to walk the rest of the distance
narrative.game_recount:
Met up with the rest of the Sydney Invictus
Supported Reed Justice in his bid to become Regent of the Harbor
Discussed what needs to be done to complete my initiation into the Invictus
Mingled with the other Kindred
narrative.standout_rp: Keeper: They used Dominate in a way that allowed me to get involved in something I otherwise wouldn't have. Reed Justice, who suggested an alternative solution to a problem that Ryan would not have come to on his own
narrative.ic_correspondence:
(This is a physical letter, as is my lieges preferred method of communication)
To my Liege, Lord Alexander of Wellington
I don't know how formal you want this letter but there's no other way to put it - Courts as fucked as you said it'd be. Never been around so many non Invictus before, and the current Premier is a Carthian so there's that. Oh and I decided to tell the other members of the First Estate about my initiation - decided I'd better not be hiding things from my betters on night 1, there was a bit of tension after that but I think for the most part things are going to be fine going forward

I think whatever plans you've got for Sydney, it's going to be more difficult than you assumed, I've dealt with literal criminals with more business sense and discipline than these creatures.

I also met up with Lord Reed and he's just as capable as you described, glad I'll be working with him.

I'm not good at ending these things, I'll do my best to get better at it
- Ryan
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Lord Reed, my liege and his seem to have a business arrangement, so as long as that holds I feel like I can trust Reed
narrative.actively_harming_pc: None, I'm currently too focused on fulfilling this Oath to worry much about the others at court
narrative.aspirations:
Short Term: Fulfill my Oath and complete my initiation into the First Estate
Medium: Establish a criminal network
Long: See a member of the First Estate installed as Prince

feeding.method: (Strength + Streetwise) - I use my knowledge of back-streets to find isolated targets. I then pounce on them, overpowering them and feeding

projects.action_type_raw: Support: Assists any other action type by you or another 🤝
projects.desired_outcome: Support Ballsack in his Patrols
projects.description:
Project Name: Assisting Ballsack
Characters involved: Me, Ballsack
Merits & Bonuses: None
XP Spend: n/a
Project description: Ballsack seems like someone who can handle business, but I wanted to know for sure. I was planning on finding out the old fashioned way, but Lord Reed suggested I head out on patrol with him instead to see how he operates.

I Support Ballsack using my knowledge of local streets and businesses, and draw on my own history as a poacher to discern where a poacher is most likely to attempt to hide their activities. To assist in this I use Protean (2): Predatory Aspect to give myself Extra Sense and Feral Senses to better locate Kindred trying to get a free feed.

Merits & Bonuses: Ride the Wave
XP Spend: Ride the Wave 4/5
Project Description: I switch my phone off for a week and disappear into the Blue Mountains. Here I work on instigating the beast through hunger, and work on redirecting the beasts desire when it inevitably tries to take hold of me. I use Protean (1): Unmarked Grave for shelter during the days in the wilderness. During this time I feed on animals and anyone in secluded mountain houses

Nonetheless, probably best to size up the competition. I use Protean (2): Predatory Aspect's Feral Senses and Extra Sense alongside my investigatory skills to locate weird happenings within the Supernatural Exclusion Zone that I'm confident aren't the work of Kindred. I don't expect to necessarily be able to tell who or what caused it, I'm mainly looking for observations that I can bring to someone who knows more about this stuff than I do

Nonetheless, probably best to size up the competition. I use Protean (2): Predatory Aspect's Feral Senses and Extra Sense alongside my investigatory skills to locate weird happenings within the Supernatural Exclusion Zone that I'm confident aren't the work of Kindred. I don't expect to necessarily be able to tell who or what caused it, I'm mainly looking for observations that I can bring to someone who knows more about this stuff than I do

narrative.travel_description: Drove and walked. No precautions except just looking around.
narrative.game_recount:
• Received city status from Brandy for being the most sociable Lance member. 
• Learned that Anichka dreamt of me. She said that I have been told what to believe for my whole unlife and perhaps I should make my own choices. 
• Spoke with Edna and learned that killing other kindred is heresy. The Brigadier has killed his neophytes many times. I've seen it. He said he was doing the right thing. Who is right? 
• Followed up with Cyrus, Alice, and Einar after our nightclub escapade. Alice wondered if this was usual for a night out and I assured her it wasn't. 
• Convinced Ivana to tell the Premier that she is Gangrel. She was afraid to admit it because she didn't want to be looked at differently but the Secretary and Protector are both Gangrel!!
narrative.standout_rp: Arlo and Marni!
narrative.ic_correspondence:
To Brigadier-General Charles Tenley,

Second court is done with regencies decided. None of the Lancea control any areas but we are allied with the Invictus so we will be able to use their land. We made a strategic play to back the Invictus to create confusion, which the Premier did ask me about. I've learned that the Premier has been tending to Sydney for over a decade with the hopes of creating a liveable city for our kind. She also said that everyone has been sent by at least one, and in one case even three others. During court I witnessed a Gangrel punish a Ventrue and it reminded me of the pack and the estate.The Ventrue turned tail like a whelp, naturally. Regarding my progress, I have earned status in the city - I believe it's partly because I'm Gangrel like the Secretary. While she is a Witch I believe I can use our shared clan to my advantage. We are planning an exhibition match between the gangrel in the city so I've been working on strengthening my powers. I will soon learn the ability to shift and so I would like to return to the estate to follow in your footsteps and hunt a tiger. I know it's a big ask but Brigadier, I really believe this will help me elevate my status within the gangrel of the city and I will show them exactly how strong the Tenley Gangrels are. 

Regards,
Tegan.
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Sister Hazel, Edna Judge
narrative.actively_harming_pc: No one yet but she's side-eyeing Red Renee from a distance.
narrative.aspirations:
Short - WIN the Gangrel fight club, gain more status in the clan. Gain Tiger form!

Medium - Befriend Brandy and be personally invited to her soirees. 

Long - Decide between staying with Lance or joining the crone. Gain more status and become more influential at court.

Characters involved: Tegan
Merits & Bonuses: Animalism 1
XP Spend: -
Project description: After a conversation with our Enforcer Doc who was concerned about the large number of rats around the docks, Tegan promised that she would look into it. She goes to the docks and questions the rats she finds. Her questions: 

Why are you at the docks - are you running from something/someone?
If yes, why, and what do they look like?

projects.desired_outcome: Gain Protean 3: Beast Form
projects.description:
Project Name: Mighty Morphin Tegan Time
Characters involved: Tegan 
Merits & Bonuses: -
XP Spend: 3
Project description: Tegan knows that Gangrel can shapeshift and has seen the Brigadier do it countless times. He always said he would teach her when the time was right. Well right now seems a pretty good time for her to figure it out herself. When she's not hunting she spends her nights ignoring the call to doomscroll and instead focuses on learning how to change her bones. She knows you have to eat the animal first. She tries with an easy catch: a rat.

projects.desired_outcome: Get to Sydney and join up with Yusuf.
projects.description:
Project Name: Sydney bound
Characters involved: Me and Yusuf
Merits & Bonuses: n/a
XP Spend: n/a
Project description: Following receiving messages from Yusuf in Sydney (he’s is the “Y” and I am the “X” in the corro) about events going down and concerns with the Carthian Movement’s direction, he requested my presence. A new adventure sounded fabulous after the last 70 odd years in Louisiana (and missing my erstwhile companion Yusuf - but I would never tell him that). I make my way from New Orleans to Sydney as soon as possible. Using my obfuscate and disguise skills I change my coffin and equipment into a Diplomatic Bag sealed item (cannot be opened by Australian authorities) for safe delivery to Sydney.

I think he is on the right track but as usual…he could do better… I will investigate the institutions and people to see what I can extract on the subject. Can’t promise it won’t hurt but no pain no gain they do say!

Fortunately (as he well knew…) I know a guy from my time in the military and the professional connections I have maintained back in the US. narrative.game_recount: See below:
narrative.standout_rp: New “Invictus” player guy in red!
narrative.ic_correspondence:
Dear Marquis Elious, 

This message shall be brief I'm sorry to say, as I am aware of how busy your movements are.

Our second night of Court was quite eye opening to say the least. The Premier of the City has announced the territories of Sydney's designs to foster Regency's two of which Lord Reed and I both took on, this means we will have to be on high alert for any poachers and deal with them as we deem fit. As long as they are able to make it to face a trial in Court. 

I had a frank discussion with Knight Ballsack and were discussing rank and title amongst us in the City. For myself taking lead on Invictus matters and acting as our Primus and Regent of the Docks, I felt the title of Lord poor fitting for someone who would be expected to carry themself with a higher station and agreed that I would accept the title of Baron in the Unconquered rather than Lord. We also discussed the swearing of Oaths and all members of the First Estate will go through their Oaths with me in person during our next Court should time allow. 

We had several new members of the First Estate arrive in Sydney and forgive me for saying so, but no signs from the spirits or Papa Gede himself could forewarn me of stupidity and lack of decorum from Neonates, was I this bad for you? All 3 of the new prospective members were introduced to me I am aware of one's Oath of the Hard Motherfucker which means he won't be a Lord until he can fulfill his Oath, one we decided to make a Lady as she proved to be incredibly helpful on the night and one who I tasked Knight Ballsack to teach a lesson to for his lack of tact, grace, intelligence and manners. He continues his requiem, barely.

Should you require any further information I can certainly write you again Marquis in a week when my current business is attended to.

Yours in eternal service,
Baron Rene St. Dominque
narrative.most_trusted_pc: Charlie Ballsack / Reed Justice
narrative.actively_harming_pc: TBA
narrative.aspirations: Short term, create a solid base of operations. Medium, personal projects like vault / prison, Long, becoming Prince.

residency_grants: All members of the Invictus and Lancae Sanctum
regency.regency_action: I would like to cultivate a feeling of constant alertness, fear with a tinge of paranoia the idea being Rene questioning Spirits and passing on little private remarks to incline to all that there isn't much that goes by in the Regency we wouldn't be aware of. And also, publicly announcing that anyone caught undermining or poaching will have to fear every shadow, nook and cranny as the Kindred who will hunt down those breaking our rules will enjoy every moment of the torture they would receive as punishment.

feeding.method: René will use his social pool to try and charm people into it.

projects.action_type_raw: Misc: For things that don't fit in other catagories 🤷‍♂️
projects.desired_outcome: René on several nights will travel to Middle Head and make his way through the tunnel networks there. Familiarising himself with all the doors that lead to the open former batteries outside.
projects.description:
Project Name: Concrete Labyrinth 
Characters Involved: René 
Project Description: In between patrols René will take a sketch book with him and a map of the area along with one of his retainers. They will map out as many of the cast iron doors around the site as possible. Paying very close attention to those that lead to the surface and those that lead further in & numbering them accordingly. 

His plan when able to travel between doors is to start connecting specific doors throughout the former bunker and his haven, along with one which may lead to a suitably booby trappable room deep underground.

actions: Driving and following René when he scouts Middle Head

meta.st_notes: René did spend time during the month preparing for a Voudon ritual in which he would mull over several expensive cigars and rum, never actually lighting it but every night reading his texts on contacting Pape Gede when the time is right
